## Newsletter 296: YouTube CEO This Algorithm Shift Will Change The Entire Platform

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/youtube-ceo-this-algorithm-shift-will-change-the-entire-platform/

```
YouTube CEO: “This Algorithm Shift Will Change The Entire Platform” 
May 15, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to save more time and see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Curious Cube


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
The Cube: Saudi Arabia's Next Megaproject
2.2M views + 2 months ago * 240 VPH

Title: The Cube: Saudi Arabia’s Next Megaproject
Formula: (Name): (Entity)’s Next (Impressive Object)
Hook score: +522
Why this works:
Epic – “Megaproject” and “Impossible Cube” along with the image of the cube in the thumbnail make this video feel epic.
Future – This is about Saudi Arabia’s next megaproject, and talking about the future builds curiosity because the future is obviously unknown.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about something epic coming in the future.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Vaporfly: Nike’s Next Super Shoe
Madame Web: Marvel’s Next Mega Franchise

Telling Triggers


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
By FEELING / me

These Triggers Are “The Tell” That You were
Neglected and Ostracized As a Child

260K views * 1 month ago «

Title: These Triggers Are “The Tell” That You were Neglected and Ostracized As a Child
Formula: These Triggers Are “The Tell” That You Were (Negative Action)
Hook score: +634
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title opens a loop because it doesn’t specify what “these triggers” are, so you have to click and find out.
Negativity – This picks at a very intense pain point for many people, which makes them want to click and learn more about it.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the triggers that reveal something bad happened to them.
Examples of this hook in action:

These Triggers Are “The Tell” Your YouTube Channel Is Failing
These Are The Signs Your Garden Is Dying

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Free Tools


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
12 Free Tools I'd Use to Learn Japanese (If |
Could Start Over)

142K views * 1 month ago «

Title: 12 Free Tools I’d Use to Learn Japanese (If I Could Start Over)
Formula: 12 Free Tools I’d Use to [Achieve Goal] (If I Could Start Over)
Hook score: +716
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to learn Japanese and “free tools” makes it sound even better.
Beginner tips – The “If I Could Start Over” part relates to and attracts beginners, which is the biggest, hungriest part of any audience.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the free tools you’d use to learn your subject if you could start over.
Examples of this hook in action:

12 Free Tools I’d Use to Learn Guitar (If I Could Start Over)
12 Free Tools I’d Use to Learn Graphic Design (If I Could Start Over)

Realistic Renders


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
| Made Famous Logos ULTRA Realistic
4.5M views + 1 month ago » 388 VPH

Title: I Made Famous Logos ULTRA Realistic
Formula: I Made Famous (Objects) ULTRA (Description)
Hook score: +1020
Why this works:
Curiosity – The realistic logo on the right being blurred out and the title both do a great job at starting a story, but leaving you on a cliffhanger so you have to click and see what they look like and how he did it.
How you can use this hook: Turn something famous into an unexpected version of it.
Examples of this hook in action:

I Played Famous Guitar Solos On The Piano
I Made Famous Logos Into Desserts

End of EVs


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
Toyota CEO: "This New Engine Will Destroy
The Entire EV Industry!"

8.6M views + 1 month ago

Title: Toyota CEO: “This New Engine Will Destroy The Entire EV Industry!”
Formula: (Authority Figure): “This New (Object) Will Destroy The Entire (Industry)!”
Hook score: +12857
Why this works:
Negativity – “Destroy the Entire EV Industry” is full of drama, which grabs people’s attention and makes them click.
Timeliness – The fact that this is about a new engine makes this feel like news and tells the audience this is relevant right now.
Authority – This uses the position of “Toyota CEO” to grab attention and build credibility.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about dramatic news an authority figure announced.
Examples of this hook in action:

Microsoft CEO: “This New Technology Will Destroy The Entire Gaming Industry!”
Elon Musk: “This New Rocket Will Destroy The Entire Space Industry!”

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
Cutting vie Unie

Tren Maya: Mexico‘s Biggest Megaproject
77K views + 2 months ago » 4 VPH

Title: Tren Maya: Mexico‘s Biggest Megaproject
Hook score: -89
Why this flopped: I think this flopped because it’s a boring idea.
The Tren Maya is just a train cutting through the jungle that nobody wants (according to the video).
Compare this to the other video in this edition from this channel mentioned earlier about The Cube.
It’s a massive golden cube big enough to fit 20 Empire State Buildings inside of it.
Because this is a bleh idea, the thumbnail turned out bleh too.
The image in the Tren Maya thumbnail is a little unclear. Then, once you realize it’s just a path cut in the jungle, it’s unimpressive (and kinda sad if you’re a tree hugger like me).
To avoid this mistake, make sure you have a great topic, title and thumbnail before you spend time and money creating your video.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
```

## Newsletter 297: The YouTube Algorithm HATES Me  Can I Get It To Change Its Mind

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/the-youtube-algorithm-hates-me-can-i-get-it-to-change-its-mind/

```
The YouTube Algorithm HATES Me — Can I Get It To Change Its Mind? 
May 8, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Warning: this edition features several long titles that I wouldn’t recommend following exactly. But there are still things we can learn from them.
P.S. if you want to save time and see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Modern Malarkey


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
This Guy HATES Modern Bikes - Can We
Change His Mind?

302K views + 3 weeks ago °

Title: This Guy HATES Modern Bikes – Can We Change His Mind?
Formula: This Guy HATES (Object) – Can We Change His Mind?
Hook score: +339
Why this works:
Negativity – The title and thumbnail are full of drama, which grabs the audience’s attention and gets them interested in the outcome.
Curiosity – This title builds curiosity and starts a story by asking a question.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how somebody hates something, then see if you can change their mind.
Examples of this hook in action:

This Guy HATES Modern Games – Can We Change His Mind?
This Girl HATES Cold Calling – Can We Change Her Mind?

Word.


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
3 WORDS to USE in your next JOB
INTERVIEW for GUARANTEED SUCCESS...

47K views + 10 days ago

Title: 3 WORDS to USE in your next JOB INTERVIEW for GUARANTEED SUCCESS! (JOB INTERVIEW TIPS!)
Formula: 3 [Tools] to USE in your next [Challenge] for GUARANTEED SUCCESS! ([Keywords]!)
Hook score: +361
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Desire – This creator’s audience wants tangible tips (3 words to use) and guaranteed success for their interview.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the 3 things they can use in their next challenge for guaranteed success.
Examples of this hook in action:

3 CSS One Liners to UPGRADE Your Next Website
3 PHRASES to use in your next SPANISH Conversation for GUARANTEED CONNECTION!

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Denim Designs


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
4 Old Jeans Ideas | DIY Denim Bags and
Purse | Compilation | Bag Tutorial | Upcycle...

688K views * 1 month ago » 653 VPH

Title: 4 Old Jeans Ideas | DIY Denim Bags and Purse | Compilation | Bag Tutorial | Upcycle Craft
Formula: 4 Old (Item) Ideas | (Keywords)
Hook score: +436
Why this works:
This channel is interesting because she does several videos about individual DIY denim projects, then does a longer compilation video with 4-9 of the projects and that video always does really well.
How you can use this hook: Make a compilation of related videos on your channel for one longer video.
Examples of this hook in action:

4 Delicious Leftovers Ideas | Quick & Easy Meal Prep
4 Best Cameras For 2023 | Street & Nature Photography Compilation

Flip It & Reverse It


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
| Tried A REVERSE Coloring Book?? *It SOLD
OUT??*

672K views + 2 months ago

Title: I Tried A REVERSE Coloring Book?? *It SOLD OUT??*
Formula: I Tried A REVERSE (Object)?? *It (Dramatic Action)??*
Hook score: +541
Why this works:
Curiosity – This is about a proven topic (coloring books), but there’s a twist because it’s a *reverse* coloring book. The fact that it sold out adds curiosity and drama.
How you can use this hook: Try a proven topic, but with a twist, like the reverse of that topic.
Examples of this hook in action:

I Tried Reverse Psychology In An Interview?? *It WORKED!*
I Tried A REVERSE SEARED Steak?? *It SOLD OUT??*

Wire Wire Pants on Fire


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
7 FATAL Wiring Mistakes Most DlYers Don't
Know They Are Making | Most Are Guilty of 3

1.7M views + 1 month ago * 819 VPH

Title: 7 FATAL Wiring Mistakes Most DIYers Don’t Know They Are Making | Most Are Guilty of 3
Formula: 7 FATAL (Activity) Mistakes Most (Group) Don’t Know They Are Making | Most Are Guilty of 3
Hook score: +918
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Negativity – Not only is this about mistakes, but “FATAL” increase the stakes and adds more fear to this.
Curiosity – “Most DIYers Don’t Know They Are Making” makes you feel like you’re getting in on a secret.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the fatal (or other scary description) mistakes most of them don’t know they are making.
Examples of this hook in action:

7 WORST Piano Mistakes Most Beginners Don’t Know They Are Making
7 FATAL Dating Mistakes Most Guys Don’t Know They Are Making

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
TRAVEL AGENT Interview Questions &
ANSWERS! (How to PASS a Travel Agent or...

1.6K views + 1 month ago

Title: TRAVEL AGENT Interview Questions & ANSWERS! (How to PASS a Travel Agent or CONSULTANT Interview!)
Hook score: -89
Why this flopped: This title flopped in the short term because it caters to such a narrow audience.
Anybody can get value from the title mentioned earlier in this email (“3 WORDS to USE in your next JOB INTERVIEW for GUARANTEED SUCCESS!”), but this video is only for travel agents.
It’ll probably rank well in search and get views over these next few years, but there is this question:
Is it worth it to make such niche videos that will get a few views each month when you could instead focus on broader-appeal videos that may get more views overall?
Many creators have to ask themselves that question and it’ll be different based on each keyword and your monetization strategy.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
```

```
1.7M views + 1 month ago * 819 VPH

Title: 7 FATAL Wiring Mistakes Most DIYers Don’t Know They Are Making | Most Are Guilty of 3
Formula: 7 FATAL (Activity) Mistakes Most (Group) Don’t Know They Are Making | Most Are Guilty of 3
Hook score: +918
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Negativity – Not only is this about mistakes, but “FATAL” increase the stakes and adds more fear to this.
Curiosity – “Most DIYers Don’t Know They Are Making” makes you feel like you’re getting in on a secret.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the fatal (or other scary description) mistakes most of them don’t know they are making.
Examples of this hook in action:

7 WORST Piano Mistakes Most Beginners Don’t Know They Are Making
7 FATAL Dating Mistakes Most Guys Don’t Know They Are Making

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
TRAVEL AGENT Interview Questions &
ANSWERS! (How to PASS a Travel Agent or...

1.6K views + 1 month ago

Title: TRAVEL AGENT Interview Questions & ANSWERS! (How to PASS a Travel Agent or CONSULTANT Interview!)
Hook score: -89
Why this flopped: This title flopped in the short term because it caters to such a narrow audience.
Anybody can get value from the title mentioned earlier in this email (“3 WORDS to USE in your next JOB INTERVIEW for GUARANTEED SUCCESS!”), but this video is only for travel agents.
It’ll probably rank well in search and get views over these next few years, but there is this question:
Is it worth it to make such niche videos that will get a few views each month when you could instead focus on broader-appeal videos that may get more views overall?
Many creators have to ask themselves that question and it’ll be different based on each keyword and your monetization strategy.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Read last week’s edition »
```

## Newsletter 299: The REAL Reason Why Your YouTube Channel Is Failing

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/the-real-reason-why-your-youtube-channel-is-failing/

```
The REAL Reason Why Your YouTube Channel Is Failing 
May 1, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
P.S. If you want to save even more time and see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out  Creator Hooks Pro .
Quittin Time


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
| Ditched Google Calendar and Time
Blocking — Here's Why

141K views * 2 months ago * 117 VPH


Title: I Ditched Google Calendar and Time Blocking — Here’s Why
Formula: I Ditched (Positive Activity) — Here’s Why
Hook score: +427
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title builds curiosity two ways: 1) It’s counterintuitive. Why would you stop something that’s helpful? 2) “Here’s Why” finishes this title off with an open loop.
Negativity – This title is all about ditching something helpful.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how you ditched something helpful.
Examples of this hook in action:

I Ditched Meal Prepping and Counting Calories— Here’s Why
I Ditched International Travel — Here’s Why

Over The Hill


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
MLB's Most Overrated Player: The Rise and
Fall of Javier Baez...

147K views + 11 days ago

Title: MLB’s Most Overrated Player: The Rise and Fall of Javier Báez…
Formula: (Entity)’s Most Overrated (Entity): The Rise and Fall of (Person)…
Hook score: +436
Why this works:
Extreme – People on YouTube love extremes. In this case, the “most overrated player” worked well (not just “a really overrated player”).
Negativity – People love to hear drama-filled stories like this one.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the most overrated thing in your niche.
Examples of this hook in action:

USA’s Most Overrated City: The Rise and Fall of San Francisco…
The Most Overrated Game: Rise and Fall of Grand Theft Auto…

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Jalapeno Business


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
GROW
JALAPE a

FROM SEED TO nO

How To Grow Jalapefio Peppers (For
Beginners) From Seed To Harvest - Pepper...

257K views + 2 months ago

Title: How To Grow Jalapeño Peppers (For Beginners) From Seed To Harvest – Pepper Geek
Formula: How To [Activity] (For Beginners) From [Start] to [Finish]
Hook score: +594
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to grow jalapeno peppers.
Beginners – Making this video specifically for beginners attracts the biggest, hungriest subset of the audience.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how to do something for beginners from start to finish.
Examples of this hook in action:

How To Flip Houses (For Beginners) From Purchase to Sale
How To Sew A Dress (For Beginners) From Start to Finish

Messiah Mess


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
The REAL Reason Why Jewish People Reject
Jesus As The Messiah

602K views » 1 month ago

Title: The REAL Reason Why Jewish People Reject Jesus As The Messiah
Formula: The REAL Reason Why (Negative Event or Action)
Hook score: +924
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title makes you feel like you’re getting in on a secret.
Negativity – This is the car crash effect in action. People are drawn to drama.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the real reason something is the way it is.
Examples of this hook in action:

The REAL Reason Why Your YouTube Channel Is Failing
The REAL Reason Why Every Kid Has ADHD Now

Cheap Street


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
The $300 Street Photography Camera No
One Knows About

356K views » 3 months ago + 30 VPH

Title: The $300 Street Photography Camera No One Knows About
Formula: The (Relatively Cheap) (Object) No One Knows About
Hook score: +2445
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title makes you feel like you’re getting in on a secret.
Desire – This creator’s audience loves cameras, especially relatively cheap ones.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a cheap tool you like that nobody knows about.
Examples of this hook in action:

The $50 Fishing Reel No One Knows About
The $20 Podcast Mic No One Talks About

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
Pregnancy Checklist: How to Plan for Birth

6.5K views * 1 month ago

Title: Pregnancy Checklist: How to Plan for Birth
Hook score: -84
Why this flopped: This channel is all about productivity, finance, and self-improvement.
This video about pregnancy doesn’t really fit with what the audience watches this channel for.
Plus, pregnancy is pretty niche compared to the above topics, too.
So to avoid this mistake, know why your audience watches your channel and deliver on that.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
```

## Newsletter 301: YouTube Mistakes That Will Ruin Your Channel

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/youtube-mistakes-that-will-ruin-your-channel/

```
YouTube Mistakes That Will Ruin Your Channel 
April 24, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to save time and see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Bustin Out The Big Guns


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
The 4 BORE Rifle (The Biggest Rifle EVER !!!)
4.9M views - 5 days ago »

Title: The 4 BORE Rifle (The Biggest Rifle EVER !!!)
Formula: The [Object] (The [Extreme Trait] [Object] EVER !!!)
Hook score: +383
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience loves big guns.
Extreme – People love to watch videos about extreme things, like, in this case, the biggest rifle ever.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the biggest (or other extreme) product ever in your niche.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Bugatti Chiron Super Sport 300+ (The Fastest Car EVER !!!)
Japanese A5 Wagyu Tomahawk (The Most Expensive Steak EVER!)

Mournful Minimalism


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
THE PROBLEM
WITH "MINIMALISM" §&

The Dark Side of Minimalism: "Decluttering
Ruined My Life"

641K views « 2 months ago

Title: The Dark Side of Minimalism: “Decluttering Ruined My Life”
Formula: The Dark Side of (Trend): “(Trend) Ruined My Life”
Hook score: +386
Why this works:
Negativity – People love drama and this title is full of it.
Timeliness – Minimalism and decluttering are popular trends right now.
Curiosity – Most people think minimalism and decluttering is great, but this title is counterintuitive and claims that it’s bad.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the dark side of a trend.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Dark Side of AI: “ChatGPT Ruined My Life”
The Dark Side of Keto: “Cutting Carbs Ruined My Life”

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Haircare Calamity


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
Haircare Mistakes That Will RUIN Your Hair
1.5M views + 1 month ago » 675 VPH

Title: Haircare Mistakes That Will RUIN Your Hair
Formula: (Activity) Mistakes That Will RUIN Your (Possession)
Hook score: +824
Why this works:
Negativity – Nobody wants to make mistakes or ruin their hair, and this title uses that to get people to click. The thumbnail also adds to the negativity with a warning.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the mistakes they might make that’ll ruin something of theirs.
Examples of this hook in action:

Management Mistakes That Will RUIN Your Career
Lighting Mistakes That Will RUIN Your Photos

Raleigh Regret


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
12 Reasons People REGRET Moving To
North Carolina

46K views « 2 months ago

Title: 12 Reasons People REGRET Moving To North Carolina
Formula: 12 Reasons People REGRET (Action)
Hook score: +1125
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Negativity – Nobody wants to have regrets, and this title uses that to its advantage.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the reasons your audience might regret making a decision.
Examples of this hook in action:

12 Reasons People REGRET Starting A YouTube Channel
12 Reasons People REGRET Investing In The Stock Market

Simple Plan


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
YOU'LL LIKE LE
THIS

This SIMPLE TRICK Changed Everything for
me

334K views + 2 months ago

Title: This SIMPLE TRICK Changed Everything for me
Formula: This SIMPLE (Niche) TRICK Changed Everything for me
Hook score: +2211
Why this works:
Desire – People love “simple tricks”, and “Changed Everything” is open-ended (which builds curiosity), but sounds like something cool happened.
Curiosity – This title is a cliffhanger because it doesn’t specify what the trick is.
Specific Audience – The thumbnail calls out people over 40, which makes them more likely to click.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a simple trick that changed everything for you.
Examples of this hook in action:

This SIMPLE Painting Trick Changed Everything for me
This SIMPLE Sleeping Trick Changed Everything for me

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
HOW MUCH MONEY DID WE SAVE? | No-
Spend Challenge | minimalism + frugal living

30K views + 1 month ago

Title: HOW MUCH MONEY DID WE SAVE? | No-Spend Challenge | minimalism + frugal living
Hook score: -84
Why this flopped: I think this flopped for two reasons:
1) It’s too complicated. It’s not easy to instantly read and understand, so people scroll on by.
2) This may have been a bad topic for her channel. It seems like her audience is into minimalism and frugalism. Although they’re kinda the same thing as saving money, they have a slightly different vibe.
To avoid these mistakes, have simple, clear titles, and know your audience and why they watch your channel.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
```

## Newsletter 302: YouTube Mistakes That Will Ruin Your Channel

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/youtube-mistakes-that-will-ruin-your-channel/

```
YouTube Mistakes That Will Ruin Your Channel 
April 24, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to save time and see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Bustin Out The Big Guns


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
The 4 BORE Rifle (The Biggest Rifle EVER !!!)
4.9M views - 5 days ago »

Title: The 4 BORE Rifle (The Biggest Rifle EVER !!!)
Formula: The [Object] (The [Extreme Trait] [Object] EVER !!!)
Hook score: +383
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience loves big guns.
Extreme – People love to watch videos about extreme things, like, in this case, the biggest rifle ever.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the biggest (or other extreme) product ever in your niche.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Bugatti Chiron Super Sport 300+ (The Fastest Car EVER !!!)
Japanese A5 Wagyu Tomahawk (The Most Expensive Steak EVER!)

Mournful Minimalism


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
THE PROBLEM
WITH "MINIMALISM" §&

The Dark Side of Minimalism: "Decluttering
Ruined My Life"

641K views « 2 months ago

Title: The Dark Side of Minimalism: “Decluttering Ruined My Life”
Formula: The Dark Side of (Trend): “(Trend) Ruined My Life”
Hook score: +386
Why this works:
Negativity – People love drama and this title is full of it.
Timeliness – Minimalism and decluttering are popular trends right now.
Curiosity – Most people think minimalism and decluttering is great, but this title is counterintuitive and claims that it’s bad.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the dark side of a trend.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Dark Side of AI: “ChatGPT Ruined My Life”
The Dark Side of Keto: “Cutting Carbs Ruined My Life”

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Haircare Calamity


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
Haircare Mistakes That Will RUIN Your Hair
1.5M views + 1 month ago » 675 VPH

Title: Haircare Mistakes That Will RUIN Your Hair
Formula: (Activity) Mistakes That Will RUIN Your (Possession)
Hook score: +824
Why this works:
Negativity – Nobody wants to make mistakes or ruin their hair, and this title uses that to get people to click. The thumbnail also adds to the negativity with a warning.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the mistakes they might make that’ll ruin something of theirs.
Examples of this hook in action:

Management Mistakes That Will RUIN Your Career
Lighting Mistakes That Will RUIN Your Photos

Raleigh Regret


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
12 Reasons People REGRET Moving To
North Carolina

46K views « 2 months ago

Title: 12 Reasons People REGRET Moving To North Carolina
Formula: 12 Reasons People REGRET (Action)
Hook score: +1125
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Negativity – Nobody wants to have regrets, and this title uses that to its advantage.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the reasons your audience might regret making a decision.
Examples of this hook in action:

12 Reasons People REGRET Starting A YouTube Channel
12 Reasons People REGRET Investing In The Stock Market

Simple Plan


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
YOU'LL LIKE LE
THIS

This SIMPLE TRICK Changed Everything for
me

334K views + 2 months ago

Title: This SIMPLE TRICK Changed Everything for me
Formula: This SIMPLE (Niche) TRICK Changed Everything for me
Hook score: +2211
Why this works:
Desire – People love “simple tricks”, and “Changed Everything” is open-ended (which builds curiosity), but sounds like something cool happened.
Curiosity – This title is a cliffhanger because it doesn’t specify what the trick is.
Specific Audience – The thumbnail calls out people over 40, which makes them more likely to click.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a simple trick that changed everything for you.
Examples of this hook in action:

This SIMPLE Painting Trick Changed Everything for me
This SIMPLE Sleeping Trick Changed Everything for me

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
HOW MUCH MONEY DID WE SAVE? | No-
Spend Challenge | minimalism + frugal living

30K views + 1 month ago

Title: HOW MUCH MONEY DID WE SAVE? | No-Spend Challenge | minimalism + frugal living
Hook score: -84
Why this flopped: I think this flopped for two reasons:
1) It’s too complicated. It’s not easy to instantly read and understand, so people scroll on by.
2) This may have been a bad topic for her channel. It seems like her audience is into minimalism and frugalism. Although they’re kinda the same thing as saving money, they have a slightly different vibe.
To avoid these mistakes, have simple, clear titles, and know your audience and why they watch your channel.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
```

## Newsletter 303: How Pro YouTubers Deal With Low CTR

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/how-pro-youtubers-deal-with-low-ctr/

```
How Pro YouTubers Deal With Low CTR 
April 17, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Perfect Posture


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
PERFECT Posture Routine To Unlock Your
Sh*t (10 Min/Day)

4.7M views + 4 weeks ago

Title: PERFECT Posture Routine To Unlock Your Sh*t (10 Min/Day)
Formula: PERFECT [Goal] Routine To [Achieve Goal] (10 Min/Day)
Hook score: +357
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants perfect posture.
Time Frame – The time frame of 10 minutes per day makes correcting your posture feel more doable and achievable.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the perfect routine that can help them achieve a goal in 10 minutes a day.
Examples of this hook in action:

PERFECT Writing Routine To Get Rid Of Writer’s Block Forever (10 Min/Day)
PERFECT Golf Swing Routine To Drive The Ball Farther (10 Min/Day)

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
HelloScam


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
| ordered HelloFresh to see if it was a scam.

2.1M views + 2 months ago

Title: I ordered HelloFresh to see if it was a scam.
Formula: I ordered (Product) to see if it was a scam.
Hook score: +446
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title hints that HelloFresh might be a scam, but it’s a cliffhanger that makes you wonder what the final verdict is.
Negativity – Talking about products being a scam does a great job at grabbing the audience’s attention.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how you got a product to see if it was a scam.
Examples of this hook in action:

I ordered a Tesla to see if it was a scam.
I tried Wealthfront to see if it was a scam.

Later Loneliness


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
How Stoics Deal With Loneliness

280K views + 1 month ago +

Title: How Stoics Deal With Loneliness
Formula: How (Authority Group) Deal With (Problem)
 Hook score: +738
Why this works:
Authority – This creator’s audience wants to be like the Stoics.
Negativity – This is all about a problem people deal with.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how the people they want to be like deal with problems.
Examples of this hook in action:

How The Top 1% Deal With Recessions
How Professional Photographers Deal With Poor Lighting

Good For Nothing


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
ONE ATOM
Railen

show

The Sharpest Object In The World Can't Cut
Anything

2.3M views + 1 month ago

Title: The Sharpest Object In The World Can’t Cut Anything
Formula: The (Most Extreme) Object In The World Can’t (Assumed Action)
Hook score: +992
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title builds curiosity two ways: 1) It’s about something extreme and unique: the sharpest object in the world. 2) It’s counterintuitive. You would assume the sharpest object in the world can cut anything.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about an extreme object that doesn’t do what everyone would assume it’s great at.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Richest Man In The World Can’t Buy Anything
You Can’t Hear The Loudest Speaker In The World

EV Envy


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
POLESTAR

Polestar 3 first look: Possibly the best
looking new EV for 2023

177K views + 2 weeks ago » 87 VPH

Title: Polestar 3 first look: Possibly the best looking new EV for 2023
Formula: (New Product) first look: Possibly the best (Trait) new (Product) for (Upcoming Year)
Hook score: +1011
Why this works:
Timeliness – “First Look” and “new EV” lets the audience know this is about something new coming in the future.
Desire – This creator’s audience likes new cars.
Curiosity – By saying this is the “best looking” it builds curiosity because it’s unique. And that curiosity is enhanced by only showing a part of the car in the thumbnail.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the first look of a new product that’s the best at something.
Examples of this hook in action:

Sony ZV first look: Possibly the best new camera for 2023
Traeger Timberline XL first look: Possibly the best high-end grill for 2023

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
The Fraught History of Re-Usable Rocketry

68K views + 2 months ago

Title: The Fraught History of Re-Usable Rocketry
Hook score: -79
Why this flopped: I like to think I’m a pretty smart guy, but when I read this title, I had to read it twice.
Fraught means… not good, right?
And re-usable rocketry… that’s what Elon is doing, right?
Titles need to be understood instantly because people are mindlessly scrolling YouTube.
I think it might’ve been better written as: “The Dark History of Re-Usable Rockets.”
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Read last week’s edition »
```

## Newsletter 305: This Is The 1 Threat To YouTubers

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/this-is-the-1-threat-to-youtubers/

```
This Is The #1 Threat To YouTubers 
April 10, 2023 by admin 


Good news — I became a dad this weekend!
It took a long time for her to get here (she was 9 days late!), so I had plenty of time to wait around and write this week’s newsletter.
This email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Enjoy!
New World Order


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
NEW WORLD @

This Is The #1 THREAT To The U.S.
ECONOMY

235K views + 5 days ago + 1.2K VPH

Title: This Is The #1 THREAT To The U.S. ECONOMY
Formula: This Is The #1 Threat To (Entity)
Hook score: +385
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title builds curiosity because it tells you there’s a threat, but leaves you hanging by not saying what that threat is.
Negativity – Talking about threats makes the audience fearful. Fear causes stress, and stress causes action, and that action is often the audience clicking your video.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience what the #1 threat to something important to them is.
Examples of this hook in action:

This Is The #1 Threat To Your Knees
This Is The #1 Threat To Your Marriage

R6 Clicks


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
The BEST R6 Attacker NOBODY Plays...
89K views + 10 days ago

Title: The BEST R6 Attacker NOBODY Plays…
Formula: The BEST (Entity) NOBODY (Activity)…
Hook score: +478
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title builds curiosity two ways. 1) There’s contrast between “Best R6 Attacker” and “NOBODY Plays”. 2) The title doesn’t specify who that attacker is, so you have to click to find out.
Desire – This creator’s audience is interested in good R6 attackers.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the best thing nobody plays, does, uses, etc.
Examples of this hook in action:

The BEST Steak NOBODY Makes…
The BEST Country NOBODY Visits…

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Collagen Confirmation


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
Do collagen supplements really work?
Dermatologist @DrDrayzday

279K views + 13 days ago * 336 VPH

Title: Do collagen supplements really work? 🤔 Dermatologist @DrDrayzday
Formula: Do (Tool) really work? 🤔 (Position)
Hook score: +487
Why this works:
Curiosity – This builds curiosity by asking a question.
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to know if collagen supplements really work.
Authority – This title drops the creator’s profession in at the end to get people to trust her content.
How you can use this hook: Ask if a tool your audience is interested in really works.
Examples of this hook in action:

Do robo investors really work? 🤔
Is the Bible actually true? Historian Explains

TSA Troubles


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
TSA Line Mistakes in 2023 (travel tips for
airport security)

65K views + 1 month ago » 40 VPH

Title: TSA Line Mistakes in 2023 (travel tips for airport security)
Formula: [Place] Mistakes in [Current Year] ([Niche] tips for [Place])
Hook score: +592
Why this works:
Negativity – Nobody wants to make mistakes, and this title benefits from that. This video is also about one of the most frustrating things about flying: the TSA line.
Timeliness – Dropping “2023” in there lets the audience know this is relevant right now.
Desire – This title finishes off by telling the audience they’ll get the main thing they watch this channel for: travel tips.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about common mistakes in your niche in the current year.
Examples of this hook in action:

Dieting Mistakes in 2023 (nutrition tips to lose weight)
Tax Mistakes in 2023 (tax filing tips for small businesses)

$20 Million Underdog


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
Meet a 23-year old from India running a
$20,000,000 company in the US

1M views + 1 month ago

Title: Meet a 23-year old from India running a $20,000,000 company in the US
Formula: Meet a (Underdog Achieving a Big Dream)
Hook score: +2439
Why this works:
Curiosity – There’s contrast between “23-year-old” and “running a $20,000,000 company”, as well as the fact that this guy is from India, but running a big company in the US.
Desire – This creator’s audience would love to run a $20,000,000 company. Plus, everybody likes a good underdog story because they can relate and be encouraged that they can do the same.
Authority & credibility – This 23-year-old isn’t just running a small company — $20,000,000 adds authority and credibility that proves he’s legit and you can learn something from him.
How you can use this hook: Introduce your audience to an underdog who’s doing something impressive.
Examples of this hook in action:

Meet the 60-Year-Old Marathoner Who Beat Addiction & Depression
Meet the blind woman who became America’s best artist

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
5 INVESTING HABITS That Will Make You A
Millionaire (DO THIS IN 2023) | Jaspreet...

28K views + 2 months ago

Title: 5 INVESTING HABITS That Will Make You A Millionaire (DO THIS IN 2023) | Jaspreet Singh
Hook score: -80
Why this flopped: This title has it all: a list, a big desire, the current year, and it’s about habits (one of my favorite topics).
So why did this flop?
Well, the title is a little longer than many of the other recent titles, so that could be it.
But honestly, I think this is just a good example that even if you write a great title, your videos won’t always go viral.
Make the best title and thumbnail you can, and make the best video you can, then let YouTube do its thing.
If you get 1% better with each video and don’t give up, you can make it on YouTube.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
```

## Newsletter 307: 10 Things You Should Avoid Saying In YouTube Videos

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/10-things-you-should-avoid-saying-in-youtube-videos/

```
10 Things You Should Avoid Saying In YouTube Videos 
April 3, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Oh yeah, and if you want to save time and see all of the titles & thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Monster Mash


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
| Remade Monsters EXACTLY as described
in the book...

2.1M views + 1 month ago

Title: I Remade Monsters EXACTLY as described in the book…
Formula: I Remade (Entities) EXACTLY as described in the (Place of Origin)…
Hook score: +427
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title (and thumbnail) does a great job at starting a story and making you want to see what the outcome will be.
Negativity – The fact that this is about monsters from books grabs the audience’s attention a little more than heroes (thanks to Netflix for this finding).
How you can use this hook: Follow the instructions of something exactly as originally described.
Examples of this hook in action:

I followed Andrew Huberman’s EXACT ideal morning routine…
I Prayed EXACTLY as Jesus instructed in the bible…

Tool Time


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
8 Tools | Regret Not Buying Sooner
400K views « 4 months ago - 22 VPH

Title: 8 Tools I Regret Not Buying Sooner
Formula: 8 (Items) I Regret Not Buying Sooner
Hook score: +486
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Negativity – Instead of saying “8 Tools I Love”, this creator said, “8 Tools I Regret Not Buying Sooner”. Everybody wants to avoid regrets and this creator uses that to their advantage here.
Desire – Almost every niche loves videos about tools.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the things you regret not doing or getting sooner.
Examples of this hook in action:

8 Cities I Regret Not Visiting Sooner
8 Movies I Regret Not Watching Sooner

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Interview Incident


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
LIFE RECRUITER!

REAL

DON'T REVEAL THESE
DURING YOUR

10 Things You Should Avoid Revealing In A
Job Interview - Interview Tips

105K views » 3 weeks ago

Title: 10 Things You Should Avoid Revealing In A Job Interview – Interview Tips
Formula: 10 Things You Should Avoid Revealing In A (Event) – (Keyword) Tips
Hook score: +497
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Negativity – This title is a warning against revealing the wrong things in an interview.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the things they should not do during an event.
Examples of this hook in action:

10 Things You Should Avoid Revealing On A First Date – Dating Tips
5 Things You Should Avoid In Your Golf Swing

Sewing Side Hustle


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
3 Sewing Projects to MAKE and SELL To
make in under 10 minutes

36K views + 3 weeks ago

Title: 3 Sewing Projects to MAKE and SELL To make in under 10 minutes
Formula: 3 (Niche) Projects to (Activity) in under (Time Frame)
Hook score: +790
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience loves sewing projects and selling their projects.
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Time Frame – The short time frame of 10 minutes increases the desire to make these projects because it makes them seem easier and more achievable.
*Note: It looks like they used poor wording with “to make” in there twice, but this is such a powerful framework that’s worked for this channel multiple times that apparently it doesn’t really matter.
How you can use this hook: Give your audience a list of things they can do in under a short time frame.
Examples of this hook in action:

3 House Projects to Make Your Kitchen Look Updated in under 20 Minutes
3 Spring Vegetables to Grow & Eat in under 3 Months

Fast Motion


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
a | ae :

2h STAR WR2Wo!;
“40-VARD DASH” .
Si A
Slowest & Fastest Star WR 40-Yard Dash
Times!

917K views + 1 month ago +

Title: Slowest & Fastest Star WR 40-Yard Dash Times!
Formula: Slowest & Fastest (Authority) (Measurements or Milestones)!
Hook score: +883
Why this works:
Curiosity – The contrast between “slowest & fastest” grabs your attention.
Timeliness – This video was published right before the NFL combine started.
Desire – NFL fans are much more interested in 40-Yard Dash times than the other combine events, like the broad jump, for example.
Authority – They mentioned “Star WR,” not just “WR,” to grab the audience’s attention.
Retention note: The times get progressively faster so you want to keep watching to see the fastest times, and they started with some popular players at first to grab your attention.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the best and worst results in a current event.
Examples of this hook in action:

Best & Worst New Year’s Resolutions For 20-Year-Olds
Slowest & Fastest Hot Dog Eating Contest Times!

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
Complete Hewn flooring installation guide

7.6K views + 1 month ago

Title: Complete Hewn flooring installation guide
Hook score: -93
Why this flopped: This video has a small potential audience compared to the rest of the videos on this channel.
Unless you’re specifically looking to install Hewn flooring (whatever that is), you probably don’t care about this video.
Contrast that to videos that almost everybody can watch and enjoy, like:

8 Tools I Regret Not Buying Sooner
This tool does more than you think
I screwed up a simple table

To avoid making this mistake yourself, consider the size of the potential audience for your topic before you make the video.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
```

## Newsletter 308: 10 Things You Should Avoid Saying In YouTube Videos

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/10-things-you-should-avoid-saying-in-youtube-videos/

```
10 Things You Should Avoid Saying In YouTube Videos 
April 3, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Oh yeah, and if you want to save time and see all of the titles & thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Monster Mash


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
| Remade Monsters EXACTLY as described
in the book...

2.1M views + 1 month ago

Title: I Remade Monsters EXACTLY as described in the book…
Formula: I Remade (Entities) EXACTLY as described in the (Place of Origin)…
Hook score: +427
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title (and thumbnail) does a great job at starting a story and making you want to see what the outcome will be.
Negativity – The fact that this is about monsters from books grabs the audience’s attention a little more than heroes (thanks to Netflix for this finding).
How you can use this hook: Follow the instructions of something exactly as originally described.
Examples of this hook in action:

I followed Andrew Huberman’s EXACT ideal morning routine…
I Prayed EXACTLY as Jesus instructed in the bible…

Tool Time


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
8 Tools | Regret Not Buying Sooner
400K views « 4 months ago - 22 VPH

Title: 8 Tools I Regret Not Buying Sooner
Formula: 8 (Items) I Regret Not Buying Sooner
Hook score: +486
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Negativity – Instead of saying “8 Tools I Love”, this creator said, “8 Tools I Regret Not Buying Sooner”. Everybody wants to avoid regrets and this creator uses that to their advantage here.
Desire – Almost every niche loves videos about tools.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the things you regret not doing or getting sooner.
Examples of this hook in action:

8 Cities I Regret Not Visiting Sooner
8 Movies I Regret Not Watching Sooner

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Interview Incident


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
LIFE RECRUITER!

REAL

DON'T REVEAL THESE
DURING YOUR

10 Things You Should Avoid Revealing In A
Job Interview - Interview Tips

105K views » 3 weeks ago

Title: 10 Things You Should Avoid Revealing In A Job Interview – Interview Tips
Formula: 10 Things You Should Avoid Revealing In A (Event) – (Keyword) Tips
Hook score: +497
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Negativity – This title is a warning against revealing the wrong things in an interview.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the things they should not do during an event.
Examples of this hook in action:

10 Things You Should Avoid Revealing On A First Date – Dating Tips
5 Things You Should Avoid In Your Golf Swing

Sewing Side Hustle


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
3 Sewing Projects to MAKE and SELL To
make in under 10 minutes

36K views + 3 weeks ago

Title: 3 Sewing Projects to MAKE and SELL To make in under 10 minutes
Formula: 3 (Niche) Projects to (Activity) in under (Time Frame)
Hook score: +790
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience loves sewing projects and selling their projects.
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Time Frame – The short time frame of 10 minutes increases the desire to make these projects because it makes them seem easier and more achievable.
*Note: It looks like they used poor wording with “to make” in there twice, but this is such a powerful framework that’s worked for this channel multiple times that apparently it doesn’t really matter.
How you can use this hook: Give your audience a list of things they can do in under a short time frame.
Examples of this hook in action:

3 House Projects to Make Your Kitchen Look Updated in under 20 Minutes
3 Spring Vegetables to Grow & Eat in under 3 Months

Fast Motion


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
a | ae :

2h STAR WR2Wo!;
“40-VARD DASH” .
Si A
Slowest & Fastest Star WR 40-Yard Dash
Times!

917K views + 1 month ago +

Title: Slowest & Fastest Star WR 40-Yard Dash Times!
Formula: Slowest & Fastest (Authority) (Measurements or Milestones)!
Hook score: +883
Why this works:
Curiosity – The contrast between “slowest & fastest” grabs your attention.
Timeliness – This video was published right before the NFL combine started.
Desire – NFL fans are much more interested in 40-Yard Dash times than the other combine events, like the broad jump, for example.
Authority – They mentioned “Star WR,” not just “WR,” to grab the audience’s attention.
Retention note: The times get progressively faster so you want to keep watching to see the fastest times, and they started with some popular players at first to grab your attention.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the best and worst results in a current event.
Examples of this hook in action:

Best & Worst New Year’s Resolutions For 20-Year-Olds
Slowest & Fastest Hot Dog Eating Contest Times!

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
Complete Hewn flooring installation guide

7.6K views + 1 month ago

Title: Complete Hewn flooring installation guide
Hook score: -93
Why this flopped: This video has a small potential audience compared to the rest of the videos on this channel.
Unless you’re specifically looking to install Hewn flooring (whatever that is), you probably don’t care about this video.
Contrast that to videos that almost everybody can watch and enjoy, like:

8 Tools I Regret Not Buying Sooner
This tool does more than you think
I screwed up a simple table

To avoid making this mistake yourself, consider the size of the potential audience for your topic before you make the video.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
```

## Newsletter 309: I Wish Every YouTuber Could Read This

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/i-wish-every-youtuber-could-read-this/

```
I Wish Every YouTuber Could Read This. 
March 27, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
P.S. If you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Dolla Dolla Bill Y’all


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
GRAB THESE NOW!

LZ

25 ITEMS YOU NEED TO BUY AT DOLLAR
TREE MARCH 2023 | DOLLAR TREE HAUL

585K views + 2 weeks ago

Title: 25 ITEMS YOU NEED TO BUY AT DOLLAR TREE MARCH 2023 | DOLLAR TREE HAUL
Formula: 25 (Objects) You Need To (Action) At (Place) (Current Month & Year) | (Keyword)
Hook score: +387
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Desire – This creator’s audience loves Dollar Tree.
Timeliness – This video was published in the beginning of March 2023 and dropping the current month and year lets the audience know this is relevant right now.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the things they need to buy or do this month.
Examples of this hook in action:

12 Vegetables You Need To Plant In March 2023
10 Stocks You Need To Buy In March 2023

Big Bets


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
Toyota Bet EVERYTHING To Destroy German
Luxury

267K views * 3 weeks ago

Title: Toyota Bet EVERYTHING To Destroy German Luxury
Formula: (Authority) Bet EVERYTHING To Destroy (Entity)
Hook score: +469
Why this works:
Negativity – This title is full of drama.
Epic – Betting “everything” increases the stakes and makes this video more interesting.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a dramatic story where one entity tried to destroy another.
Examples of this hook in action:

Nintendo Bet EVERYTHING To Destroy Ubisoft
We Bet EVERYTHING To Save Our Relationship

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Calling All Christians


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
| wish every Christian could watch this.

214K views + 1 month ago

Title: I wish every Christian could watch this.
Formula: I wish every (Specific Audience) could watch this.
Hook score: +623
Why this works:
Curiosity – This is a cliffhanger that makes you wonder what this video is about.
Specific Audience – By calling out Christians, this creator makes Christians — his ideal audience — more likely to watch this video.
How you can use this hook: This is simple — just call out your specific audience and say you wish they could all watch this.
Examples of this hook in action:

I wish every Photographer could watch this.
I wish every Hiker could watch this.

Anti Ant


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
Suloh ANUS OREVER

Make Your Yard ANT FREE FOREVER In 3
Easy Steps

681K views * 1 month ago + 247 VPH

Title: Make Your Yard ANT FREE FOREVER In 3 Easy Steps
Formula: Make Your (Possession) (Problem) FREE FOREVER In 3 Easy Steps
Hook score: +1434
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants an ant-free yard.
Negativity – This title is all about a pain point: ants in your yard.
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how they can be problem-free in 3 easy steps.
Examples of this hook in action:

Make Your Computer SPAM FREE FOREVER In 3 Easy Steps
Make Your Knees PAIN FREE FOREVER In 3 Easy Steps

Battle of the Macs


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
$599 M2 Mac Mini vs $13,000 Mac Pro |
DaVinci Resolve Battle

223K views + 2 m

Title: $599 M2 Mac Mini vs $13,000 Mac Pro | DaVinci Resolve Battle
Formula: (Inexpensive Item) vs. (Expensive Item) | (Keyword) battle
Hook score: +1769
Why this works:
Curiosity – The contrast between the relatively inexpensive $599 M2 Mac Mini and the expensive $13,000 Mac Pro builds curiosity.
Desire – This creator’s audience loves DaVinci Resolve and Mac products.
X vs. Y – Everybody loves a little competition, especially when it’s a competition between two opposite opponents. In this case, a cheap vs. expensive option.
How you can use this hook: Test an expensive vs. inexpensive product in your niche.
Examples of this hook in action:

$100 Plane Ticket vs. $1,000 Plane Ticket
$50 M2 Mac Mini vs $500 Golf Club | Golf Club Battle

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
The Cringiest Fast & Furious Movies
RANKED | IDEALIST

12K views * 1 month ago

Title: The Cringiest Fast & Furious Movies RANKED | IDEALIST
Hook score: -85
Why this flopped: This channel is about cars — only cars. Not movies about cars.
A mistake many creators make is making videos about topics their audience isn’t interested in. Or, at least, isn’t interested in hearing about from them.
It could be a big difference, like if a fitness channel giving financial advice, or a small difference, like this example.
The key to avoiding this mistake is knowing why your audience watches your channel and delivering that.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
```

## Newsletter 311: 6 Dirty Secrets YouTubers Refuse To Talk About

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/6-dirty-secrets-youtubers-refuse-to-talk-about/

```
6 Dirty Secrets YouTubers Refuse To Talk About 
March 20, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Mealtime Mistakes


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
Mistakes Everyone Makes When Cooking
Corned Beef And Cabbage

145K views + 10 days ago

Title: Mistakes Everyone Makes When Cooking Corned Beef And Cabbage
Formula: Mistakes Everyone Makes When (Activity)
Hook score: +402
Why this works:
Timeliness – This video was published a week before St. Patty’s Day, when many people in America make corned beef and cabbage.
Negativity – Nobody wants to make mistakes when they’re cooking corned beef and cabbage, so this title grabs their attention.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the mistakes everybody makes when doing an activity around a certain holiday or season.
Examples of this hook in action:

Mistakes Everyone Makes When Buying Fireworks
Mistakes Everyone Makes When Filing Their Taxes

See Ya Chicago


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
5 Reasons why you should NOT move to
Chicago

6.7K views + 2 months ago

Title: 5 Reasons why you should NOT move to Chicago
Formula: 5 Reasons why you should NOT (Activity)
Hook score: +767
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Curiosity – This video is counterintuitive because it’s a Chicago real estate agent telling you why you should not move to Chicago.
Negativity – Telling people why they should NOT move to Chicago will often grab their attention more than if you tell them that they should move to Chicago.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience why they should NOT do something they’re considering.
Examples of this hook in action:

5 Reasons why you should NOT start a YouTube Channel
5 Reasons why you should NOT learn Spanish

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Instant Improvement


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
Just Do
THIS -

The Single FASTEST Way To Improve As A
Producer

80K views + 2 weeks ago

Title: The Single FASTEST Way To Improve As A Producer
Formula: The Single FASTEST Way To (Achieve Goal)
Hook score: +972
Why this works:
Desire – Not only does this creator’s audience want to improve as a producer, they want to improve fast.
Curiosity – This title says there is a single fastest way to improve as a producer, but doesn’t specify what it is, so you need to click to find out.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the single fastest way they can improve or achieve a goal.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Single FASTEST Way To Improve Your Golf Swing
The Single FASTEST Way To Lose Belly Fat

You’re Still Wearing That?!


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
6 Outdated Trends to Ditch in 2023 & What
to Wear Instead

270K views * 1 month ago

Title: 6 Outdated Trends to Ditch in 2023 & What to Wear Instead
Formula: 6 Outdated Trends to Ditch in 2023 & What to (Activity) Instead
Hook score: +1102
Why this works:
Timeliness – This video was published in the beginning of 2023, so this tells the audience this video is about current trends.
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Negativity – Nobody wants to wear outdated clothes.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the trends that are currently outdated.
Examples of this hook in action:

6 Outdated Graphic Design Trends to Ditch in 2023
6 Outdated Interior Design Trends to Ditch in 2023 & What to Buy Instead

Shhhh


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
6 Dirty Secrets Backpackers Refuse To Talk
About

84K views « 2 weeks ago

Title: 6 Dirty Secrets Backpackers Refuse To Talk About
Formula: 6 Dirty Secrets (Group) Refuse To Talk About
Hook score: +1142
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Curiosity – “Secrets” that people “Refuse To Talk About” builds a ton of curiosity here because you feel like you’re getting scandalous insider information.
Negativity – The fact that these are “dirty” secrets makes this title so much more exciting.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the dirty secrets people in your niche refuse to taco bout.
Examples of this hook in action:

6 Dirty Secrets Mortgage Brokers Refuse To Talk About
6 Dirty Secrets Doctors Refuse To Talk About

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
ia

We Finally Know How To Eat Cactus Without
Getting Poked

3.7K views * 1 month ago

Title: We Finally Know How To Eat Cactus Without Getting Poked
Hook score: -92
Why this flopped: Ah yes, the cactus-eating video I’ve been waiting for!
I’m not exactly a foodie, so maybe there’s some delicious cactus trend I’m unaware of, but I don’t think this video has a large potential audience.
To avoid this mistake yourself, research your video’s topic and make sure your audience will be interested in it before you make the video.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
```

## Newsletter 313: The Best YouTube Strategy For Beginners In 2023

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/the-best-youtube-strategy-for-beginners-in-2023/

```
The Best YouTube Strategy For Beginners In 2023 
March 13, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
India Here I Come


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
INDIA trawel guide 2028 | EVERYTHING to
kmonr before you Ce
172K views + 2 months ago

Title: INDIA travel guide 2023 | EVERYTHING to know before you go
Formula: (Place or Object) guide (Current Year) | EVERYTHING to know before you (Action)
Hook score: +411
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants an India travel guide before they go.
Timeliness – This video was published in the beginning of 2023, and using the year in the title lets the audience know this is relevant right now.
How you can use this hook: Give your audience a guide for the current year and tell them everything they need to know before they do something.
Examples of this hook in action:

Homesteading guide 2023 | EVERYTHING to know before you start
Portland Living 2023 | EVERYTHING to know before you move here

ABSolutely Killer Workout


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
Tie Best Workeut Routine for beginmenrs
66K views * 12 days ago

Title: The Best Workout Routine for Beginners
Formula: The Best (Activity) Routine for Beginners
Hook score: +488
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants the best workout routine.
Beginner – Videos for beginners do well because they’re the biggest, hungriest part of any audience.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the best routine for beginners.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Best Piano Practice Routine for Beginners
The Best Painting Kit for Beginners

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Bye Bye 9-5


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
Quit your 9-5 with these 3 Etsy Store
Ideas - Six Figure Strategies

31K views + 2 months ago

Title: Quit your 9-5 with these 3 Etsy Store Ideas – Six Figure Strategies
Formula: Quit your (Unwanted Responsibility) with these 3 (Niche) Ideas – (End Goal) Strategies
Hook score: +548
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to quit their 9-5.
Negativity – This title is all about moving away from pain — “Quit your 9-5″.
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Curiosity – This title mentions “these 3 Etsy Store Ideas”, but doesn’t specify what they are, which builds curiosity by opening a loop.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience they can achieve a goal and move away from pain with your list of ideas.
Examples of this hook in action:

Quit Overeating with these 3 Weird Mind Tricks
Quit Slicing The Ball with these 3 Golf Swing Drills – Professional Golf Strategies

iPhone Infatuation


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
“ye Newer LOWED An [Phore Cese Mera
317K views » 2 months ago + 68 VPH

Title: I’ve Never LOVED An iPhone Case More
Formula: I’ve Never LOVED An (Object) More
Hook score: +572
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience love tech accessories.
Curiosity – This title is a cliff-hanger — why does he love this one so much?
Extreme – This title is a big, bold statement, which typically does better on YouTube than weaker statements (“I Really LOVED This iPhone Case,” for example).
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how you’ve never loved an object more.
Examples of this hook in action:

I’ve Never LOVED A BBQ Sandwich More
I’ve Never LOVED A Video Game More

Hopeful Habits


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
HABITS to Break the NEGATIVE
Programming of Your MIND! | Joe Dispenz...
50K views + 2 weeks ago

Title: HABITS to Break the NEGATIVE Programming of Your MIND! | Joe Dispenza | Top 10 Rules
Formula: HABITS to Break the (Negative Activity)! | (Authority Figure) | Top 10 Rules
Hook score: +1282
Why this works:
Negativity – This title is about moving away from pain — “Break the Negative Programming of Your Mind.” Plus, there’s a bit of “stick it to the man” vibes, fear, and conspiracy here with the “Programming of Your Mind” part.
List – This title finishes off with a list, which builds curiosity and makes this video more tangible.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the habits to stop an unwanted state they’re currently in.
Examples of this hook in action:

HABITS to Break the Poverty Cycle In Your Family
HABITS to Break the Constant Arguing With Your Wife

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
$60 DIGITAL NOMAD hotel in Kuala Lumpur

14K views - 4 months ago

Title: $60 DIGITAL NOMAD hotel in Kuala Lumpur😁🙌🏼
Hook score: -86
Why this flopped: A $60 hotel is pretty unremarkable.
Even if a $60 hotel is the “best hotel in KL” (like the thumbnail says) or expensive for KL, $60 is too average to grab most people’s attention.
If it was a $5 hotel or $1,000 hotel, those prices would probably do a better job at getting the audience’s attention.
Plus, these creators broke the “Show, Don’t Tell” rule in the thumbnail.
They’re telling me in the thumbnail that it’s the best hotel in KL, but they certainly aren’t showing me (what am I even looking at?).
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
```

Thumbnail: $60 DIGITAL NOMAD hotel in Kuala Lumpur

14K views - 4 months ago
