## Newsletter 314: The Best YouTube Strategy For Beginners In 2023

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/the-best-youtube-strategy-for-beginners-in-2023/

```
The Best YouTube Strategy For Beginners In 2023 
March 13, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
India Here I Come


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
INDIA trawel guide 2028 | EVERYTHING to
kmonr before you Ce
172K views + 2 months ago

Title: INDIA travel guide 2023 | EVERYTHING to know before you go
Formula: (Place or Object) guide (Current Year) | EVERYTHING to know before you (Action)
Hook score: +411
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants an India travel guide before they go.
Timeliness – This video was published in the beginning of 2023, and using the year in the title lets the audience know this is relevant right now.
How you can use this hook: Give your audience a guide for the current year and tell them everything they need to know before they do something.
Examples of this hook in action:

Homesteading guide 2023 | EVERYTHING to know before you start
Portland Living 2023 | EVERYTHING to know before you move here

ABSolutely Killer Workout


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
Tie Best Workeut Routine for beginmenrs
66K views * 12 days ago

Title: The Best Workout Routine for Beginners
Formula: The Best (Activity) Routine for Beginners
Hook score: +488
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants the best workout routine.
Beginner – Videos for beginners do well because they’re the biggest, hungriest part of any audience.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the best routine for beginners.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Best Piano Practice Routine for Beginners
The Best Painting Kit for Beginners

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Bye Bye 9-5


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
Quit your 9-5 with these 3 Etsy Store
Ideas - Six Figure Strategies

31K views + 2 months ago

Title: Quit your 9-5 with these 3 Etsy Store Ideas – Six Figure Strategies
Formula: Quit your (Unwanted Responsibility) with these 3 (Niche) Ideas – (End Goal) Strategies
Hook score: +548
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to quit their 9-5.
Negativity – This title is all about moving away from pain — “Quit your 9-5″.
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Curiosity – This title mentions “these 3 Etsy Store Ideas”, but doesn’t specify what they are, which builds curiosity by opening a loop.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience they can achieve a goal and move away from pain with your list of ideas.
Examples of this hook in action:

Quit Overeating with these 3 Weird Mind Tricks
Quit Slicing The Ball with these 3 Golf Swing Drills – Professional Golf Strategies

iPhone Infatuation


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
“ye Newer LOWED An [Phore Cese Mera
317K views » 2 months ago + 68 VPH

Title: I’ve Never LOVED An iPhone Case More
Formula: I’ve Never LOVED An (Object) More
Hook score: +572
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience love tech accessories.
Curiosity – This title is a cliff-hanger — why does he love this one so much?
Extreme – This title is a big, bold statement, which typically does better on YouTube than weaker statements (“I Really LOVED This iPhone Case,” for example).
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how you’ve never loved an object more.
Examples of this hook in action:

I’ve Never LOVED A BBQ Sandwich More
I’ve Never LOVED A Video Game More

Hopeful Habits


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
HABITS to Break the NEGATIVE
Programming of Your MIND! | Joe Dispenz...
50K views + 2 weeks ago

Title: HABITS to Break the NEGATIVE Programming of Your MIND! | Joe Dispenza | Top 10 Rules
Formula: HABITS to Break the (Negative Activity)! | (Authority Figure) | Top 10 Rules
Hook score: +1282
Why this works:
Negativity – This title is about moving away from pain — “Break the Negative Programming of Your Mind.” Plus, there’s a bit of “stick it to the man” vibes, fear, and conspiracy here with the “Programming of Your Mind” part.
List – This title finishes off with a list, which builds curiosity and makes this video more tangible.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the habits to stop an unwanted state they’re currently in.
Examples of this hook in action:

HABITS to Break the Poverty Cycle In Your Family
HABITS to Break the Constant Arguing With Your Wife

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
$60 DIGITAL NOMAD hotel in Kuala Lumpur

14K views - 4 months ago

Title: $60 DIGITAL NOMAD hotel in Kuala Lumpur😁🙌🏼
Hook score: -86
Why this flopped: A $60 hotel is pretty unremarkable.
Even if a $60 hotel is the “best hotel in KL” (like the thumbnail says) or expensive for KL, $60 is too average to grab most people’s attention.
If it was a $5 hotel or $1,000 hotel, those prices would probably do a better job at getting the audience’s attention.
Plus, these creators broke the “Show, Don’t Tell” rule in the thumbnail.
They’re telling me in the thumbnail that it’s the best hotel in KL, but they certainly aren’t showing me (what am I even looking at?).
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.

## Newsletter 315: 23 Free YouTube Hacks To Grow Your Channel In 2023

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/23-free-youtube-hacks-to-grow-your-channel-in-2023/

```
23 Free YouTube Hacks To Grow Your Channel In 2023 
March 6, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
P.S. Want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place? Check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Ubiquitous UFOs


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
Why UFOs are Suddenly
EVERYWHERE

6.6M views + 1 month ago

Title: Why UFOs are Suddenly EVERYWHERE
Formula: Why (Objects) are Suddenly (Action)
Hook score: +305
Why this works:
Curiosity – This promises to answer a question a lot of people are asking themselves.
Timeliness – UFOs are currently trending everywhere, so this is a hot topic right now.
Negativity – UFOs are a scary and weird topic, so they grab your attention more than something more neutral, like trains.
How you can use this hook: If something weird or scary is happening in your niche, explain to your audience why it’s happening.
Examples of this hook in action:

Why Red Boots are Suddenly EVERYWHERE
Why Every Website Suddenly Has a Gradient

That New New


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
NEW Ak-47 in Rainbow Six Siege

175K views * 2 weeks ago

Title: NEW Ak-47 in Rainbow Six Siege
Formula: NEW (Object) in (Entity)
Hook score: +501
Why this works:
Timeliness & Desire – People love new things. That’s it, that’s the tweet.
How you can use this hook: This one is simple: tell your audience about something new they will love.
Examples of this hook in action:

NEW YouTube Shorts Monetization Structure
NEW Fat Loss Miracle Drug Is Legit

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Ballin on a Budget


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
23 INSANELY CHEAP Destinations
for Buc gst Travel in 27023

193K views * 2 months ago

Title: 23 INSANELY CHEAP Destinations for Budget Travel in 2023
Formula: 23 INSANELY CHEAP (Objects) for (Niche) in (Current Year)
 Hook score: +759
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Desire – This creator’s audience loves travel destinations. But not only that, they also love cheap travel destinations. Talking about inexpensive things caters to the broadest audience (not everybody can afford expensive things) in a way that people want them (inexpensive).
Timeliness – This video was published at the end of 2022, when everybody was thinking about travel plans for 2023.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about inexpensive things they’d love to do this year.
Examples of this hook in action:

23 INSANELY CHEAP Stocks To Buy In March 2023
10 INSANELY CHEAP Camera Accessories for Outdoor Photography in 2023

2 Problems 1 Solution


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
Beat Beil ri

Belly Fat, Insulin Resistance, and a
Hack to Beat Them Both

801K views * 1 month ago

Title: Belly Fat, Insulin Resistance, and a Hack to Beat Them Both
Formula: (Problem), (Problem), and a Hack to Beat Them Both
Hook score: +1154
Why this works:
Negativity – This title grabs the audience’s attention by mentioning two pain points in the beginning.
Desire – This title promises to fix both of those pain points with a single hack.
How you can use this hook: Mention two of your audience’s pain points and a hack to beat them both.
Examples of this hook in action:

Procrastination, No Motivation, and a Hack to Beat Them Both
Dry Chicken, Bland Taste, and a Hack to Beat Them Both

Lovely Layouts


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
11 Section layouts to make your
weositte ultra UNIQUE

83K views * 3 weeks ago « 47 VPH

Title: 11 Section layouts to make your website ultra UNIQUE
Formula: 11 (Objects) to make your (Possession) ultra UNIQUE
 Hook score: +1220
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Desire – This creator’s audience loves section layouts to make their website unique.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about 11 things they can use to achieve their goals.
Examples of this hook in action:

5 Stretches to make your Back Pain FREE
11 Sounds to make your Beats ultra UNIQUE

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
| Okay, who
wants pie?

Enjoy the Holidays AND Stay Keto

14K views + 2 months ago

Title: Enjoy the Holidays AND Stay Keto
Hook score: -91
Why this flopped: The most obvious reason this flopped is because it’s boring.
The best titles have curiosity, fear, and/or desire, but this title has none of that.
But there’s another mistake here: repeating the thumbnail in the title.
Thumbnail text should be complementary to the title and work like a 1-2 punch.
When you repeat your title in the thumbnail, you’re missing an opportunity to get the audience to click.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.

## Newsletter 317: Write Better YouTube Titles With This ONE Simple Method

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/write-better-youtube-titles-with-this-one-simple-method/

```
Write Better YouTube Titles With This ONE Simple Method 
February 27, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Listen Up


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
Improve your
ISTERING

SPEAKING
SKILLS

IMPROVE your LISTENING and SPEAKING
skills with this ONE simple method...

476K views + 1 month ago

Title: IMPROVE your LISTENING and SPEAKING skills with this ONE simple method
Formula: (Reach Goal) with this ONE simple method
Hook score: +357
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to improve their listening and speaking skills, and “one simple method” to do that makes this video even more enticing.
Curiosity – This opens a loop by mentioning there’s a simple method to improve your listening and speaking, but not saying what that simple method is.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience they can achieve a goal with “this one simple method”.
Examples of this hook in action:

Improve your Coding Skills with this ONE simple method
Produce Amazing Beats with this ONE simple method

Less Is More


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
HOW TO BE a
LESS

EMOTIONALLY Ww:
REACTIVESS

How to Be Less Emotionally Reactive: Black
and White Thinking

432K views + 1 month ago

Title: How to Be Less Emotionally Reactive: Black and White Thinking
Formula: How to Be Less (Unwanted Trait): (Named Strategy)
Hook score: +385
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to be less emotionally reactive.
Negativity – This is about moving away from pain (being less emotionally reactive), rather than towards pleasure (e.g. being more emotionally stable).
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how to be less of an unwanted trait by using a named strategy.
Examples of this hook in action:

How to Be Less Tired: Morning Sunlight Practice
How to Stop Procrastinating: Baby Step Strategy

Mid Golfer


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
187

Medusa!

me

MID HANDICAP Golfer BREAKS 80 12 days
AFTER USING THIS DRILL!

243K views + 1 month ago

Title: MID HANDICAP Golfer BREAKS 80 12 days AFTER USING THIS DRILL!
Formula: (Average Person) (Achieves Difficult Goal) (Time Frame) AFTER USING THIS (Drill or Tool)!
Hook score: +525
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience would love to break 80.
Time Frame – “12 Days” makes this drill seem even more effective since it works so fast.
Specific Audience – If you’re a mid handicap golfer (which the majority of people are), you feel like this video was made for you.
Curiosity – This title builds curiosity two ways: 1) It opens a loop with “this drill”. You know this drill is effective, but you don’t know what it is, so you’ve gotta click to find out. 2) It’s counterintuitive that a mid handicap golfer (aka an average golfer) can break 80 (a great score).
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how an average person in your niche achieved something great after using “this drill”.
Examples of this hook in action:

YouTuber with 1,000 Subs Reaches 1,000,000 12 days AFTER USING THIS Strategy!
Lonely Guy Goes on 10 Dates in 12 days After Reading This Book

She Gone


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
CUT HER OFF If She Does These Things
During The Dating Stage! (VET HER OUT)

61K views * 1 month ago

Title: CUT HER OFF If She Does These Things During The Dating Stage! (VET HER OUT)
Formula: [Take a Negative Action] If [Negative Things Happen] During The [Early Stage]! ([Action])
Hook score: +622
Why this works:
Negativity – This is all about a negative thing, which grabs the audience’s attention.
Curiosity – This opens a loop because she talks about the things that mean you should cut her off, but doesn’t tell you what those things are.
How you can use this hook: Warn your audience to stop doing something if something else is happening.
Examples of this hook in action:

It’s Time To Sell Your Real Estate If These Things Happen During A Recession
Go Home If You See This In The Sky While Boating

Mt. Rushmore of YouTube


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
Genius YouTube Advice for 15 Minutes
Straight...

314K views + 1 month ago

Title: Genius YouTube Advice for 15 Minutes Straight…
Formula: Genius (Niche) Advice for 15 Minutes Straight…
Hook score: +785
Why this works:
Desire – This channel’s audience wants genius YouTube advice.
Time Frame – “15 Minutes Straight” lets you know exactly what you’re gonna get if you click this video, which makes more people click.
Authority – The thumbnail uses authority because it has many of the top YouTubers faces’ on it.
How you can use this hook: Give your audience advice for your niche for 15 minutes straight.
Examples of this hook in action:

Genius Running Advice for 15 Minutes Straight…
Genius Photography Advice for 15 Minutes Straight…

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
(now B=
GENETIC sige
|| ANXIETY2

)ADHD? OGD?) Uh
DEPRESSION?

How Genetic Is Mental Illness Actually?
Heritability Estimates for Mental Health Th...

23K views + 2 months ago

Title: How Genetic Is Mental Illness Actually? Heritability Estimates for Mental Health The Role Genes Play
Hook score: -88
Why this flopped: This title is too wordy and confusing.
There are lots of big words that make it hard to read.
I think it could’ve been better if she just took everything out after the question mark.
To avoid this mistake, make your titles easy to read while skimming.
You don’t need to summarize the entire video in your title.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.

## Newsletter 318: Write Better YouTube Titles With This ONE Simple Method

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/write-better-youtube-titles-with-this-one-simple-method/

```
Write Better YouTube Titles With This ONE Simple Method 
February 27, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Listen Up


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
Improve your
ISTERING

SPEAKING
SKILLS

IMPROVE your LISTENING and SPEAKING
skills with this ONE simple method...

476K views + 1 month ago

Title: IMPROVE your LISTENING and SPEAKING skills with this ONE simple method
Formula: (Reach Goal) with this ONE simple method
Hook score: +357
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to improve their listening and speaking skills, and “one simple method” to do that makes this video even more enticing.
Curiosity – This opens a loop by mentioning there’s a simple method to improve your listening and speaking, but not saying what that simple method is.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience they can achieve a goal with “this one simple method”.
Examples of this hook in action:

Improve your Coding Skills with this ONE simple method
Produce Amazing Beats with this ONE simple method

Less Is More

How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how to be less of an unwanted trait by using a named strategy.
Examples of this hook in action:

How to Be Less Tired: Morning Sunlight Practice
How to Stop Procrastinating: Baby Step Strategy

## Newsletter 319: This Study Changes Everything We Know About YouTube

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/this-study-changes-everything-we-know-about-youtube/

```
This Study Changes Everything We Know About YouTube 
February 20, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Decorating Decrees


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
EDI MOMMY. COM

10 Home Decorating Rules that changed my
life!

133K views + 2 weeks ago

Title: 10 Home Decorating Rules that changed my life!
Formula: 10 (Niche) Rules that changed my life!
Hook score: +354
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience is into home decorating rules. Plus, “changed my life” makes these rules seem even cooler.
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the rules that changed your life.
Examples of this hook in action:

10 Wood Working Rules that changed my life!
10 Graphic Design Rules that changed my life!

Buying Time


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
Is it time to buy? Housing Market Update

51K views + 8 days ago

Title: ⚡️ Is it time to buy? Housing Market Update ✨
Formula: ⚡️ Is it time to (Action)? (Niche) Update ✨
Hook score: +536
Why this works:
Curiosity – This builds curiosity by asking a question.
Desire – This creator’s audience loves housing market updates.
Timeliness – This is about what’s happening in the housing market right now.
How you can use this hook: Ask if it’s time to take an action your audience has been waiting on, then give them an update.
Examples of this hook in action:

⚡️ Is it time to Sell? Crypto Update ✨
Is it time to Fish? Spring Trout Update 🎣

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Don’t Do These


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
ACCOUNTANT EXPLAINS: Money Habits
Keeping You Poor

4M views + 1 month ago « 7.5K VPH

Title: ACCOUNTANT EXPLAINS: Money Habits Keeping You Poor
Formula: (Authority Position) Explains: (Niche) Habits Keeping You (Unwanted State)
Hook score: +1904
Why this works:
Negativity – This is all about the fear of staying poor and trying to avoid it.
Authority – This video feels more believable because its from an accountant.
How you can use this hook: If you’re a professional, let the audience know at the beginning of the title. Then, tell them about the habits that are keeping them in an unwanted state.
Examples of this hook in action:

TRAINER EXPLAINS: Eating Habits Keeping You Fat
Marriage Counselor EXPLAINS: Communication Habits Keeping You Distant

Fishy Findings


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
This STUDY Changes EVERYTHING We
Know About BASS FISHING

849K views + 1 month ago

Title: This STUDY Changes EVERYTHING We Know About BASS FISHING
Formula: This STUDY Changes EVERYTHING We Know About (Niche)
Hook score: +2234
Why this works:
Credibility – The fact that this video is about a study makes you feel like it’s legit, so you’re more likely to watch it and trust what it says.
Curiosity – This title opens a loop because it starts a story, but doesn’t finish it.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a study that changes everything you know about a topic they’re interested in.
Examples of this hook in action:

This STUDY Changes EVERYTHING We Know About YouTube
This STUDY Changes EVERYTHING We Know About Learning a New Language

Walkin on Water


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
How Fast Can You Touch Water in Every
Sonic Game?

1.1M views + 13 days ago

Title: How Fast Can You Touch Water in Every Sonic Game?
Formula: How Fast Can You (Negative Action) in Every (Entity)?
Hook score: +3594
Why this works:
Curiosity – This builds curiosity by asking a question.
Negativity – This video is about touching water, which essentially kills Sonic.
How you can use this hook: Ask how fast you can do something negative.
Examples of this hook in action:

How Fast Can I Lose $100 In Every Casino Game?
How Fast Can You Kill The Battery In Every Smart Phone?

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
be.

Should you consider a 1031 Exchange?

1.6K views + 2 months ago

Title: Should you consider a 1031 Exchange?
Hook score: -93
Why this flopped: Titles that mention benefits, hopes, and fears typically do better than titles that get into nerdy specifics, like this one.
Plus, this video is only 1:42. It seems like either shorts or longer videos work best on YouTube right now… not videos stuck in the middle like this one.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.

Is it time to buy? Housing Market Update

51K views + 8 days ago

Title: ⚡️ Is it time to buy? Housing Market Update ✨
Formula: ⚡️ Is it time to (Action)? (Niche) Update ✨
Hook score: +536
Why this works:
Curiosity – This builds curiosity by asking a question.
Desire – This creator’s audience loves housing market updates.
Timeliness – This is about what’s happening in the housing market right now.
How you can use this hook: Ask if it’s time to take an action your audience has been waiting on, then give them an update.
Examples of this hook in action:

⚡️ Is it time to Sell? Crypto Update ✨
Is it time to Fish? Spring Trout Update 🎣

Get Your Personal YouTube Coach


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Hi, I'm your personal Al coach

How about “5 Easy Tips to increase Your

YouTube Views Today”? It is more specific and er)
has a clearer call to action.

vidIQ just launched their AI Personal YouTube coach to help you grow your channel.
It can help you:

Come up with video ideas
Write better titles
Write your video script
Write your tags and description
And more

If you wanna give it a try, you can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here:
Try vidIQ for $1.
(Affiliate link)
Don’t Do These


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
ACCOUNTANT EXPLAINS: Money Habits
Keeping You Poor

4M views + 1 month ago « 7.5K VPH

Title: ACCOUNTANT EXPLAINS: Money Habits Keeping You Poor
Formula: (Authority Position) Explains: (Niche) Habits Keeping You (Unwanted State)
Hook score: +1904
Why this works:
Negativity – This is all about the fear of staying poor and trying to avoid it.
Authority – This video feels more believable because its from an accountant.
How you can use this hook: If you’re a professional, let the audience know at the beginning of the title. Then, tell them about the habits that are keeping them in an unwanted state.
Examples of this hook in action:

TRAINER EXPLAINS: Eating Habits Keeping You Fat
Marriage Counselor EXPLAINS: Communication Habits Keeping You Distant

Fishy Findings


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
This STUDY Changes EVERYTHING We
Know About BASS FISHING

849K views + 1 month ago

Title: This STUDY Changes EVERYTHING We Know About BASS FISHING
Formula: This STUDY Changes EVERYTHING We Know About (Niche)
Hook score: +2234
Why this works:
Credibility – The fact that this video is about a study makes you feel like it’s legit, so you’re more likely to watch it and trust what it says.
Curiosity – This title opens a loop because it starts a story, but doesn’t finish it.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a study that changes everything you know about a topic they’re interested in.
Examples of this hook in action:

This STUDY Changes EVERYTHING We Know About YouTube
This STUDY Changes EVERYTHING We Know About Learning a New Language

Walkin on Water


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
How Fast Can You Touch Water in Every
Sonic Game?

1.1M views + 13 days ago

Title: How Fast Can You Touch Water in Every Sonic Game?
Formula: How Fast Can You (Negative Action) in Every (Entity)?
Hook score: +3594
Why this works:
Curiosity – This builds curiosity by asking a question.
Negativity – This video is about touching water, which essentially kills Sonic.
How you can use this hook: Ask how fast you can do something negative.
Examples of this hook in action:

How Fast Can I Lose $100 In Every Casino Game?
How Fast Can You Kill The Battery In Every Smart Phone?

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
be.

Should you consider a 1031 Exchange?

1.6K views + 2 months ago

Title: Should you consider a 1031 Exchange?
Hook score: -93
Why this flopped: Titles that mention benefits, hopes, and fears typically do better than titles that get into nerdy specifics, like this one.
Plus, this video is only 1:42. It seems like either shorts or longer videos work best on YouTube right now… not videos stuck in the middle like this one.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.

## Newsletter 321: 5 YouTube tips That Will Blow Up Your Channel In 2023

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/5-youtube-tips-that-will-blow-up-your-channel-in-2023/

```
5 YouTube tips That Will Blow Up Your Channel In 2023 
February 13, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Food Fears


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
°
z
a
a
wu
«
a

5 Food Items That Will Skyrocket in Price in
2023 (That You'll Want)

301K views » 4 weeks ago

Title: 5 Food Items That Will Skyrocket in Price in 2023 (That You’ll Want)
Formula: 5 [Niche] Items That Will [Negative Action] in [Upcoming Year] (That You’ll Want)
Hook score: +307
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Negativity – This is leveraging the audience’s fear of food being scarce.
Timeliness – Dropping “In 2023” in a video published in the beginning of 2023 grabs the audience’s attention because they know this video is relevant right now.
Curiosity – This video talks about the future, which builds curiosity because the future is unknown.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about things that will increase in price or become more difficult to get in the upcoming year.
Examples of this hook in action:

5 Cities That Will Limit Visitors in 2023 (That You’ll Want To Visit)
5 Stores That Will Shut Down in 2023

Florida’s Future


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
Clermont Florida is going to BOOM
(here's why)

43K views * 11 days ago * 37 VPH

Title: Clermont Florida is going to BOOM (here’s why)
Formula: [Area] is going to BOOM (here’s why)
Hook score: +390
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title also builds curiosity by talking about the future.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a place or thing that will boom in the future.
Examples of this hook in action:

Microsoft Stock is going to BOOM (here’s why)
Engineering Jobs are going to BOOM (here’s why)

The Fastest Way To Find Great Topics For Your Channel


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Views

Subscribers

Videos

Avg daily views

Avg subscribers/day

Avg videos/day

300K

250K

200K

150K

100K

204K

297K

243K
204k
~

Two of my favorite tools for finding topics in my niche that are working right now:
1) vidIQ’s Trending Tool
2) vidIQ’s Competitor Dashboard
Their trending tool lets you see what videos are getting views on your competitor’s channels right now (this is an awesome alternative to just sorting a channel’s videos by most popular, which may show old videos that aren’t getting views anymore).
And their competitors feature lets you add competitors to a dashboard so you can see all of their top videos in one place, instead of taking the time to go to each channel individually.
You can get a 30-day trial for just $1 here.
(Affiliate link)
Titanic Takis


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
| Made 3-Foot Takis
379K views + 1 month ago * 63 VPH

Title: I Made 3-Foot Takis
Formula: I Made (Extremely Large Object)
Hook score: +494
Why this works:
Curiosity – This builds curiosity because it’s unique and extreme.
Desire – Who wouldn’t want a 3-foot Takis?!
How you can use this hook: Make something that’s much bigger than the normal version.
Examples of this hook in action:

I Made 3-Foot iPhone
I Bought The World’s Heaviest Dumbbell

Degree Decisions


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
Engineering Degree Tier List 2023 (The BEST
Engineering Degrees RANKED)

121K views * 1 month ago » 56 VPH

Title: Engineering Degree Tier List 2023 (The BEST Engineering Degrees RANKED)
Formula: [Entity] Tier List 2023 (The Best [Entities] RANKED)
Hook score: +993
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience loves degree rankings.
Timeliness – Dropping “2023” in there lets the audience know this is relevant right now.
How you can use this hook: This one is simple: rank objects in your niche for the upcoming year.
Examples of this hook in action:

Seattle Neighborhood Tier List 2023 (The Best Seattle Neighborhoods RANKED)
Top MLB Teams 2023 (The Best MLB Teams RANKED)

Did You Catch That?


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
Things You Only Notice In Starship Troopers
As An Adult

926K views + 2 weeks ago «

Title: Things You Only Notice In Starship Troopers As An Adult
Formula: Things You Only Notice In (Entity) As An (Specific Type of Person)
Hook score: +1254
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title builds curiosity by making you wonder what these things are. It also kinda makes you feel like you’re getting in on a secret.
“Adult” – Adult things catch the audience’s attention more because they’re controversial, and people love controversy.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the things you only notice in something as a specific type of person.
Examples of this hook in action:

Things You Only Notice At Disney World As An Adult
Things Only Former Servers Notice At Restaurants

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
BEST—
i BANG, =

| |
FOR -.

Pecron 1500 Pro Review -
Affordable Off Grid Power Option

27K views + 1 month ago

Title: Pecron 1500 Pro Review – Affordable Off Grid Power Option
Hook score: -70
Why this flopped: This title is boring.
I’m not saying it’s not effective — it probably attracted buyers for the Pecron 1500 Pro and they probably got lots of affiliate sales. Plus, it’ll probably rank it search and do well in the long term.
Buuutttt… they could’ve spiced it up a bit. They could’ve turned it into a story or an experiment to get more views and maybe make more sales.
For example, he could’ve talked about how long he survived off the grid using only that power station in a video titled, “I Survived 10 Days Off The Grid With No Power.” (Btw I have no idea how long these things actually last.)
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Thank you for reading and I hope you enjoyed this week’s edition. If you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, share your referral link with them.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.

## Newsletter 323: 10X Your YouTube Channel With ChatGPT

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/10x-your-youtube-channel-with-chatgpt/

```
10X Your YouTube Channel With ChatGPT 
February 6, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
P.S. I want to make Creator Hooks better for you, but in order to do that, I need to know more about you. Can you fill out this quick survey so I can make this newsletter better?  Here’s a link to the survey . Thank you!
One Dress To Rule Them All


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
THE ONLY DRESS YOU NEED TO
OWN | Nikol Johnson

139K views * 2 months ago

Title: THE ONLY DRESS YOU NEED TO OWN | Nikol Johnson
Formula: The Only (Object) You Need To Own
Hook score: +386
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience loves dresses.
Curiosity – “The Only Dress” builds curiosity two ways: 1) It makes you wonder what the dress is and 2) The constraint of just 1 dress you need to own makes for a more interesting story.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the only object in a category they need to own.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Only Stock You Need To Own
The Only Question You Need To Ask Job Candidates

Earth 2.0


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
NEW CONFIRMED EARTH

TESS Telescope Found New Planets
[Setter tham Fertig

191K views + 2 weeks ago *

Title: TESS Telescope Found New Planets Better than Earth!
Formula: (Authority) (Activity) New (Entities) Better than (Current Best Entity)!
Hook score: +395
Why this works:
Timeliness – This title feels like news and people love news.
Curiosity – It’s counterintuitive that there are any planets better than Earth, so that build curiosity.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about something recently discovered that’s better than the current best.
Examples of this hook in action:

Marine Biologists Find New Shark Deadlier a Great White!
Ferrari Builds World’s Fastest Super Car!

The Easiest Way To Spy On Your Competitors

Two of my favorite tools for spying on my competitors:
1) vidIQ’s Trending Tool
2) vidIQ’s Competitor Dashboard
Their trending tool lets you see what videos are getting views on a channel right now (this is an awesome alternative to just sorting a channel’s videos by most popular, which may show old videos that aren’t getting views anymore).
And their competitors feature lets you add competitors to a dashboard so you can see all of their top videos in one place, instead of taking the time to go to each channel individually.

Excellent AI Tips


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
10X Your Excel Skills with ChatGPT
/

1.3M views + 3 weeks ago * 7.9K VPH

Title: 10X Your Excel Skills with ChatGPT 🚀
Formula: 10X Your (Product or Niche) Skills with ChatGPT 🚀
Hook score: +760
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to 10X their Excel skills.
Timeliness – ChatGPT is trending like crazy right now, so this title rides that wave.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how they can 10X their skills with ChatGPT
Examples of this hook in action:

10X Your Productivity with ChatGPT 🚀
10X Your Copywriting Skills with ChatGPT 🚀

Overpriced Oranges


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
What $100 Buys at the World's Most
Expensive GROCERY STORE

261K views * 3 weeks ago

Title: What $100 Buys at the World’s Most Expensive GROCERY STORE
Formula: What $100 Buys at the World’s Most Expensive (Place)
Hook score: +1044
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title starts a story, but doesn’t finish it, so you need to click and watch the video. Also, “World’s Most Expensive Grocery Store” builds curiosity because it’s extreme.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience what $100 buys at the most expensive version of the place they shop.
Examples of this hook in action:

What $100 Buys at the World’s Most Expensive Beauty Store
What $300,000 Gets You In New York’s Most Expensive Neighborhood

Walkin Into Skinniness


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
| WALKED
ONE HOUR

EVERY DAY
30 DAYS:

My Results Walking Every Day || Fat
Loss!

441K views * 3 weeks ago + 247 VPH

Title: My Results Walking Every Day || Fat Loss!
Formula: My Results (Activity) Every Day || (Goal)!
Hook score: +1764
Why this works:
Daily Tips – People love hearing about things you can do or have done every day.
Time Frame – Time frames make videos more tangible and there are two in the thumbnail: one hour and 30 days.
Curiosity – This title makes you want to see his results.
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to lose fat.
How you can use this hook: Do an activity every day for 30 days and share your results.
Examples of this hook in action:

My YouTube Growth Posting A Short Every Day For 30 Days
My Results After Meditating Every Day || Focus & Peace

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
How to Record Multiple USB Mics at
Once

17K views * 1 month ago + 6 VPH

Title: How to Record Multiple USB Mics at Once
Hook score: -95
Why this flopped: It’s tough to say this video “flopped” because it’s probably meant to rank in search, and therefore is not expected to get many views right away.
That being said, I have a few thoughts on this.
First, always keep in mind the potential audience size when you’re making a video and make sure it’s worth it for you.
In this case, would it make more sense for this creator to spend his time making another video about 10Xing your skills with ChatGPT (see his video above) than a video about recording with multiple mics? Maybe.
Second, this title could be spiced up a bit.
He could refute an objection (“How to Record Multiple USB Mics at Once without ___”), call out beginners (“How to Record Multiple USB Mics at Once for Beginners”) or used the current year to let the audience know its about what’s working right now (“How to Record Multiple USB Mics at Once in 2023″).
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)

## Newsletter 324: 10X Your YouTube Channel With ChatGPT

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/10x-your-youtube-channel-with-chatgpt/

```
10X Your YouTube Channel With ChatGPT 
February 6, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
P.S. I want to make Creator Hooks better for you, but in order to do that, I need to know more about you. Can you fill out this quick survey so I can make this newsletter better?  Here’s a link to the survey . Thank you!
One Dress To Rule Them All


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
THE ONLY DRESS YOU NEED TO
OWN | Nikol Johnson

139K views * 2 months ago

Title: THE ONLY DRESS YOU NEED TO OWN | Nikol Johnson
Formula: The Only (Object) You Need To Own
Hook score: +386
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience loves dresses.
Curiosity – “The Only Dress” builds curiosity two ways: 1) It makes you wonder what the dress is and 2) The constraint of just 1 dress you need to own makes for a more interesting story.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the only object in a category they need to own.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Only Stock You Need To Own
The Only Question You Need To Ask Job Candidates

Earth 2.0


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:

TESS Telescope Found New Planets
[Setter tham Fertig

191K views + 2 weeks ago *

Title: TESS Telescope Found New Planets Better than Earth!
Formula: (Authority) (Activity) New (Entities) Better than (Current Best Entity)!
Hook score: +395
Why this works:
Timeliness – This title feels like news and people love news.
Curiosity – It’s counterintuitive that there are any planets better than Earth, so that build curiosity.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about something recently discovered that’s better than the current best.
Examples of this hook in action:

Marine Biologists Find New Shark Deadlier a Great White!
Ferrari Builds World’s Fastest Super Car!

## Newsletter 325: 5 YouTube Tips You Wont Find Anywhere Else

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/5-youtube-tips-you-wont-find-anywhere-else/

```
5 YouTube Tips You Won’t Find Anywhere Else 
January 30, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Game Changer


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
This Card Changes EVERYTHING -
Best Credit Card EVER?

146K views * 1 month ago

Title: This Card Changes EVERYTHING – Best Credit Card EVER?
Formula: This (Object) Changes EVERYTHING – Best (Object) EVER?
Hook score: +370
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title builds curiosity two ways: 1) “Changes Everything” is open-ended and makes you want to know what changed and what’s the effect. 2) It ends with a question.
Desire – This creator’s audience loves the latest and greatest credit cards.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the tool that changes everything and might be the best ever.
Examples of this hook in action:

This Tent Changes EVERYTHING – Best Cold Weather Tent EVER?
This Camera Changes EVERYTHING – Best Camera EVER?

Amazing Arpeggios


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
BEAUTIFUL
Arpeggios

ia

PLAY PIANO WITH LISA
3 Essential Arpeggios ™
Geginner Pismo Lesson)

214K views + 1 month ago * 102 VPH

Title: 3 Essential Arpeggios 🎹✨ (Beginner Piano Lesson)
Formula: 3 Essential [Objects] [Relevant Emoji] (Beginner [Activity] Lesson)
Hook score: +455
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Beginner Tips – Calling out beginners in the title works well because beginners are the biggest, hungriest part of any audience.
Desire – This channel’s audience wants beginner piano lessons.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the three essential things they need to learn.
Examples of this hook in action:

3 Essential Arm Exercises 💪 (Beginner Arm Workouts)
3 Essential Interview Questions 👔 (Beginner Interviewer Lesson)

😲 CREATORS: WANT MORE BRAND PARTNERSHIPS? 💸
Justin Moore, founder of Creator Wizard, has a free weekly report that’s gonna get you PAID!


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
CM Sarah Renae Clark
@SarahRenaeClark

Replying to

is one of the newsletters I’m excited
to open. That’s a weird emotion to have in your inbox,
right?

He teaches creators how to negotiate good brand
deals, and he’s done a lot of research for you! So much

value in every email.
Kristen Bousquet
@kbousq

Replying to

But also is the king of creator
newsletters, in my opinion.

The Creator Wizard newsletter will help you:

Find which brands & companies are sponsoring creators
Pitch more effectively
Get paid more $$$ on each partnership
Immediately get better looking and tell funnier jokes (probably)

Join 10K+ creators and sign up here.
Perfect Pencil


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
| waited 16
Wear is

PENCIL DRAWING SECRETS TO MAK...
IF tis gerncil works, teil charge
your life,

1.1M views + 3 months ago + 256 VPH

Title: If this pencil works, it will change your life.
Formula: If this (Tool) works, it will change your life.
Hook score: +859
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants amazing pencils.
Curiosity – “Change your life” is open-ended and makes you want to know what will change and what’s the effect.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the tool that, if it works, will change their life.
Examples of this hook in action:

If this app works, it will change your life.
If this memory trick works, it will change your life.

Way of the Warriors


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
The Entire NBA FEARS The
WARRIORS Because of this PLAY!

127K views * 1 month ago

Title: The Entire NBA FEARS The WARRIORS Because of this PLAY!
Formula: The Entire (Group) Fears (Entity) Because of this (Possession or Action)!
Hook score: +1191
Why this works:
Negativity – People love hearing about things we fear.
Curiosity – “this PLAY” opens a loop because it doesn’t specify what the play is, so you need to watch the video to find out.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about something everybody fears and why.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Entire Music Industry Fears Kendrick Lamar Because of this SONG!
Marvel Fears DC Because of this MOVIE!

Serger Secrets


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
5 Overlocker Tips You Won't Find in
the Manual (my best serger tips!)

37K views * 3 weeks ago

Title: 5 Overlocker Tips You Won’t Find in the Manual (my best serger tips!)
Formula: 5 [Tool] Tips You Won’t Find in the Manual (my best [Tool] tips!)
Hook score: +1406
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Curiosity – This title makes you feel like you’re getting in on a secret.
Desire – This creator’s audience wants serger tips.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the tips for a tool your audience won’t find in the manual.
Examples of this hook in action:

5 Traeger Tips You Won’t Find in the Manual (my best Grilling tips!)
5 Math Tips Your Teacher Won’t Show You (my best Math tips!)

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
Quit (Quietly)

3.9K views + 1 month ago

Title: Quit (Quietly)
Hook score: -92
Why this flopped: I’m a little confused about what’s going on here.
Is he telling me to quit quietly? Did he quit quietly? Why should I quit quietly?
When it comes to titles, clarity is king, and this title broke that commandment.
To avoid this mistake, make sure your audience knows what you’re trying to tell them and why in your title.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.

5 YouTube Tips You Won’t Find Anywhere Else 
January 30, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Game Changer


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
This Card Changes EVERYTHING -
Best Credit Card EVER?

146K views * 1 month ago

Title: This Card Changes EVERYTHING – Best Credit Card EVER?
Formula: This (Object) Changes EVERYTHING – Best (Object) EVER?
Hook score: +370
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title builds curiosity two ways: 1) “Changes Everything” is open-ended and makes you want to know what changed and what’s the effect. 2) It ends with a question.
Desire – This creator’s audience loves the latest and greatest credit cards.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the tool that changes everything and might be the best ever.
Examples of this hook in action:

This Tent Changes EVERYTHING – Best Cold Weather Tent EVER?
This Camera Changes EVERYTHING – Best Camera EVER?

Amazing Arpeggios


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
BEAUTIFUL
Arpeggios

ia

PLAY PIANO WITH LISA
3 Essential Arpeggios ™
Geginner Pismo Lesson)

214K views + 1 month ago * 102 VPH

Title: 3 Essential Arpeggios 🎹✨ (Beginner Piano Lesson)
Formula: 3 Essential [Objects] [Relevant Emoji] (Beginner [Activity] Lesson)
Hook score: +455
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Beginner Tips – Calling out beginners in the title works well because beginners are the biggest, hungriest part of any audience.
Desire – This channel’s audience wants beginner piano lessons.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the three essential things they need to learn.
Examples of this hook in action:

3 Essential Arm Exercises 💪 (Beginner Arm Workouts)
3 Essential Interview Questions 👔 (Beginner Interviewer Lesson)

😲 CREATORS: WANT MORE BRAND PARTNERSHIPS? 💸
Justin Moore, founder of Creator Wizard, has a free weekly report that’s gonna get you PAID!


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
CM Sarah Renae Clark
@SarahRenaeClark

Replying to

is one of the newsletters I’m excited
to open. That’s a weird emotion to have in your inbox,
right?

He teaches creators how to negotiate good brand
deals, and he’s done a lot of research for you! So much

value in every email.
Kristen Bousquet
@kbousq

Replying to

But also is the king of creator
newsletters, in my opinion.

The Creator Wizard newsletter will help you:

Find which brands & companies are sponsoring creators
Pitch more effectively
Get paid more $$$ on each partnership
Immediately get better looking and tell funnier jokes (probably)

Join 10K+ creators and sign up here.
Perfect Pencil


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
| waited 16
Wear is

PENCIL DRAWING SECRETS TO MAK...
IF tis gerncil works, teil charge
your life,

1.1M views + 3 months ago + 256 VPH

Title: If this pencil works, it will change your life.
Formula: If this (Tool) works, it will change your life.
Hook score: +859
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants amazing pencils.
Curiosity – “Change your life” is open-ended and makes you want to know what will change and what’s the effect.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the tool that, if it works, will change their life.
Examples of this hook in action:

If this app works, it will change your life.
If this memory trick works, it will change your life.

Way of the Warriors


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
The Entire NBA FEARS The
WARRIORS Because of this PLAY!

127K views * 1 month ago

Title: The Entire NBA FEARS The WARRIORS Because of this PLAY!
Formula: The Entire (Group) Fears (Entity) Because of this (Possession or Action)!
Hook score: +1191
Why this works:
Negativity – People love hearing about things we fear.
Curiosity – “this PLAY” opens a loop because it doesn’t specify what the play is, so you need to watch the video to find out.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about something everybody fears and why.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Entire Music Industry Fears Kendrick Lamar Because of this SONG!
Marvel Fears DC Because of this MOVIE!

Serger Secrets


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
5 Overlocker Tips You Won't Find in
the Manual (my best serger tips!)

37K views * 3 weeks ago

Title: 5 Overlocker Tips You Won’t Find in the Manual (my best serger tips!)
Formula: 5 [Tool] Tips You Won’t Find in the Manual (my best [Tool] tips!)
Hook score: +1406
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Curiosity – This title makes you feel like you’re getting in on a secret.
Desire – This creator’s audience wants serger tips.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the tips for a tool your audience won’t find in the manual.
Examples of this hook in action:

5 Traeger Tips You Won’t Find in the Manual (my best Grilling tips!)
5 Math Tips Your Teacher Won’t Show You (my best Math tips!)

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
Quit (Quietly)

3.9K views + 1 month ago

Title: Quit (Quietly)
Hook score: -92
Why this flopped: I’m a little confused about what’s going on here.
Is he telling me to quit quietly? Did he quit quietly? Why should I quit quietly?
When it comes to titles, clarity is king, and this title broke that commandment.
To avoid this mistake, make sure your audience knows what you’re trying to tell them and why in your title.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.

## Newsletter 327: 4 Habits That Keep YouTube Channels small

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/4-habits-that-keep-youtube-channels-small/

```
4 Habits That Keep YouTube Channels small 
January 23, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Not In My House


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
Plants | Will NEVER Buy Again <=
Why | Wouldn't Own These 10...

56K views * 2 weeks ago * 72 VPH

Title: Plants I Will NEVER Buy Again 🌿 Why I Wouldn’t Own These 10 Houseplants Again
Formula: (Products) I Will NEVER Buy Again (Relevant Emoji) Why I Wouldn’t Own These 10 (Products) Again
Hook score: +362
Why this works:
Negativity – This title is all about warning her audience against houseplants she didn’t like.
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Curiosity – The end of this title is a cliff-hanger — it makes you want to know what the 10 houseplants are.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the products you would never buy again.
Examples of this hook in action:

Cities I Will NEVER Visit Again 🏛️ Why I Wouldn’t Visit These 5 Cities Again
Shoes I Will NEVER Buy Again 👟 Why I Wouldn’t Own These 10 Shoes Again

Woman Wisdom


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
MAKE
HER
OBSESSED

Women are easily attracted to men
who know these things

233K views * 1 month ago

Title: Women are easily attracted to men who know these things
Formula: (Object of Interest) are easily attracted to (Target Audience) who know these things
Hook score: +580
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title builds curiosity because it doesn’t specify what “these things” are, but gets you interested in them, so you have to click and find out.
Desire – This creator’s audience (men) want to easily attract women.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience that who or what they want to attract are more attracted when they know “these things”.
Examples of this hook in action:

Money is attracted to people who know these things
Inner peace is attracted to people who know these things

Write Better YouTube Titles In 1 Hour
I A/B tested 103 YouTube Titles and put all the results into an ebook.
Here’s a sample page:


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
A: 6 Ways To Create Remarkable Photos

B: | Stopped Taking Boring Photos Once |
Learned This

A:3.10% CTR B:4.01% CTR _ Difference: 29%

Explanation: Title A is a good list title, but Title B
mentions a pain point ("Stopped Taking Boring
Photos") and builds curiosity by opening a loop
("Once | Learned This"). In this test, these two
factors helped increase the CTR.

If you want to see all 103 test results and breakdowns, get the book here.
Helpless Habits


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
AHAB TS THAT KFFP GODLY MIEN
WEAK

332K views * 2 weeks ago *

Title: 4 HABITS THAT KEEP GODLY MEN WEAK
Formula: 4 Habits That Keep (Audience) (Unwanted Attribute)
Hook score: +661
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Negativity – This is about habits men should avoid that keep them weak.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the 4 habits that keep them in an unwanted state.
Examples of this hook in action:

4 Habits That Keep Musicians Broke
4 Habits That Keep Marriages Strained

Reelin and Dealin


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
a
How To Create 30 Instagram Reels
in 24 Hours with Canva

284K views + 1 month ago * 127 VPH

Title: How To Create 30 Instagram Reels in 24 Hours with Canva
Formula: How To Create (Number) (Outcome) in (Time Frame) with (Tool)
Hook score: +1589
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to create lots of Instagram Reels fast.
Time Frame – “in 24 Hours” makes this video feel more tangible and exciting — it’s about creating a lot of reels in a short amount of time.
How you can use this hook: Teach your audience how to create lots of products with a simple tool in a short, specific time frame.
Examples of this hook in action:

How To Create 10 Meals in 1 Hour with an Air Fryer
How To Create 10 Tweets In 10 Minutes from 1 Blog Post

Mustang Gang


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
Mustang GT Dark Horse 2024 is
Going to be The Game Changer

118K views * 4 weeks ago » 147 VPH

Title: Mustang GT Dark Horse 2024 is Going to be The Game Changer
Formula: (Product) (Upcoming Year) is Going to be the Game Changer
Hook score: +7876
Why this works:
Curiosity – This builds curiosity because it’s talking about a future product, and the future is inherently unknown.
Desire – This creator’s audience loves mustangs and new cars.
Timeliness – This video was published soon after Ford unveiled their plans for the Mustang GT Dark Horse and everybody was talking about it.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about an upcoming product that’s going to be a game changer.
Examples of this hook in action:

iPhone 16 2024 is Going to be the Game Changer
Marvel’s Thunderbolts In 2024 is going to Change the Game

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
DEAL WITH

lf you're a Jealous Person, weten
this

17K views * 1 month ago

Title: If you’re a Jealous Person, watch this
Hook score: -81
Why this flopped: I think this flopped because nobody gets excited and says, “Hey, I’m a jealous person! This video is for me.”
I have a feeling that it would’ve done better if, instead of labeling the person as jealous, it positioned jealousy as a problem that can be fixed. Something like, “Watch This To STOP Feeling Jealous.”
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions  here .
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.

Curiosity – The end of this title is a cliff-hanger — it makes you want to know what the 10 houseplants are.

Money is attracted to people who know these things

## Newsletter 329: YouTube is Changing  How to Win in 2023

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/youtube-is-changing-how-to-win-in-2023/

```
YouTube is Changing – How to Win in 2023 
January 16, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
SEO News


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
SEO TIPS THAT ACTUALLY WORK
SEO is Changing - How to Win in
2023

32K views * 1 month ago

Title: SEO is Changing – How to Win in 2023
Formula: (Niche) is Changing – How to Win in (Current Year)
Hook score: +320
Why this works:
Timeliness – This video was published at the end of 2022 when 2023 was on everyone’s mind.
Curiosity – “Changing” is open-ended. It could be good change or bad change, but either way it’s unknown, so the audience needs to click to find out what’s changed. It also talks about the future (because this was published at the end of 2022), which is another great way to build curiosity.
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to win with SEO.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience that your niche or a platform your audience uses is changing in the upcoming year, and promise to show them how to win even with these changes.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Music Industry is Changing – How to Win in 2023
Investing is Changing – How to Win in 2023

Take The Red Pill


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
these things helped me escape the
inrietrtse

233K views * 1 month ago * 80 VPH

Title: these things helped me escape the matrix
Formula: these things helped me escape (Negative Place)
Hook score: +356
Why this works:
Curiosity – “These things” builds curiosity because she mentions them, but doesn’t specify what they are, so you need to click to find out.
Negativity – This video is all about escaping a scary place.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience the things that helped you escape a scary place.
Examples of this hook in action:

these things helped me escape poverty
these things helped me escape my sugar addiction

Write Better YouTube Titles In 1 Hour
I A/B tested 103 YouTube Titles and put all the results into an ebook.
Here’s a sample page:


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
A: Not Learning My Lesson in Kuala Lumpur
Malaysia

B: Kuala Lumpur’s Beautiful Caves Have 1
Problem

A: 2.52% CTR B:3.29% CTR _ Difference: 31%

Explanation: Title A is about the creator, so in Title
B | made it about the destination and added an
open loop and negativity.

If you want to see all 103 test results and breakdowns, get the book here.
Butter Bath


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
| Ate 100 TBSP Of BUTTER In 10
Days: Here Is What Happened To ...

1.2M views + 3 weeks ago + 913 VPH

Title: I Ate 100 TBSP Of BUTTER In 10 Days: Here Is What Happened To My BLOOD
Formula: I (Activity) in 10 Days: Here Is What Happened To My (Possession)
Hook score: +402
Why this works:
Time Frame – “In 10 Days” makes this video feel more tangible.
Curiosity – “Here Is What Happened To My Blood” builds curiosity because it’s a cliff-hanger. You want to click and see what happened.
Negativity – This title is about doing something many people think is unhealthy, it’s not about how he ate an apple a day for 10 days.
Credibility – This video feels very legit because he’s measuring blood, not just sharing how he feels.
How you can use this hook: Do something scary for a specific amount of days and then share with your audience what happened.
Examples of this hook in action:

I Applied For 100 Jobs in 10 Days: Here Is What Happened
I Ran 100 Miles in 10 Days: Here Is What Happened To My Heart Rate

Cabin Check


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
| Saeed ws

Do These 12 Things as Soon as You
Get Into Your Cruise Cabin

194K views * 3 weeks ago * 397 VPH

Title: Do These 12 Things as Soon as You Get Into Your Cruise Cabin
Formula: Do These 12 Things as Soon as You (Action)
Hook score: +685
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Curiosity – “Do These 12 Things” opens a loop because it doesn’t specify what the things are, so you need to click and find out.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about things they need to do as soon as something happens or as soon as they do something else.
Examples of this hook in action:

Do These 3 Things as Soon as You Wake Up Every Morning
Do These 5 Things Before You Choose A New Home

Cake Walk


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
BEAUTIFUL BUTTERCREAM
‘il Haess to Iviake Your Gales Look
Professional

56K views * 1 month ago

Title: 11 Hacks to Make Your Cakes Look Professional
Formula: 11 Hacks To Make Your (Possession) Look (Desired Adjective)
Hook score: +1120
Why this works:
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Desire – This creator’s audience want their cakes to look professional and they want hacks to do it.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about hacks that can help them achieve a goal.
Examples of this hook in action:

11 Hacks To Make Your Car Look Brand New
11 Hacks To Sound Like A Native Spanish Speaker

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 8:
Dengers of Dry Fasting &
Dehydration

61K views + 4 weeks ago » 9 VPH
caption for image
Title: Dangers of Dry Fasting & Dehydration
Hook score: -88
Why this flopped: This topic just seems obvious (and therefore boring) to me.
Of course there are dangers associated with dehydration!
If this was about the dangers of Keto or intermittent fasting, which many people are passionate about and assume is good for you, then I bet it would do better.
That being said, there could be some health trend that I don’t know about where people think dehydration is good for you.
Anyway, this week’s lesson is this: obvious topics don’t normally work well.
Be contrarian, challenge your audience’s assumptions, talk about their fears and desires.
Just don’t be obvious.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Hope you enjoyed this week’s edition and if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)

## Newsletter 331: 10 YouTube Trends Everybody Is Sick Of

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/10-youtube-trends-everybody-is-sick-of/

```
10 YouTube Trends Everybody Is Sick Of 
January 11, 2023January 9, 2023 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Daily Dues


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
English study plan - 20-minute daily
English learning routine

650K views * 1 month ago * 250 VPH

Title: English study plan – 20-minute daily English learning routine
Formula: (Subject) study plan – 20-minute daily (Subject) learning routine
Hook score: +357
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience wants to learn English.
Time Frame – “20-minute” learning routine makes this study plain (and therefore, this video) feel more tangible and achievable.
Daily – People love daily tips because they can just plug them into their routine.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a 20-minute daily study plan to help them achieve their goals.
Examples of this hook in action:

MBA study plan – 20-minute daily study routine
Physics study plan – 20-minute daily physics learning routine

Motor Mirage


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
The GENIUS Reason Why F1
Steering Looks BROKEN

1.3M views + 1 month ago » 16 VPH

Title: The GENIUS Reason Why F1 Steering Looks BROKEN
Formula: The GENIUS Reason Why (Object) Looks BROKEN
Hook score: +426
Why this works:
Curiosity – There’s contrast between “genius reason” and “looks broken”, which builds curiosity and interest.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a genius reason something in your niche looks broken.
Examples of this hook in action:

The GENIUS Reason Why the Stock Market Looks BROKEN
The GENIUS Reason Why Picasso’s Paintings Look WEIRD

Learn the Science of Succeeding as a Creator
If you love Creator Hooks, you’ll love Creator Science – a newsletter designed to help you accelerate your journey to becoming a professional creator.
Today’s most successful creators aren’t just artists – they’re scientists. They are students of the game and are constantly running experiments to understand what kind of content is working.
Creator Science is written by my friend Jay Clouse, a full-time creator earning nearly $350,000 per year.
Each week you’ll receive:

Specific growth advice
Interviews with top creators
Insight from his own creator business

Subscribe for free at creatorscience.com.
Sewing Secrets


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
6 SECRET SEWING TOOLS YOU
DDN TANGA YOU INIEIEIBIEDE

81K views * 3 weeks ago + 147 VPH

Title: 6 SECRET SEWING TOOLS YOU DID’NT KNOW YOU NEEDED!
Formula: 6 Secret (Industry) Tools You Didn’t Know You Needed!
Hook score: +440
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title makes you feel like you’re getting in on a secret.
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
Desire – This creator’s audience loves learning about sewing tools.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the secret sewing tools they didn’t know they needed.
Examples of this hook in action:

6 Secret Productivity Tools You Didn’t Know You Needed!
6 Secret Fishing Gadgets You Didn’t Know You Needed!

Terrible Teammates


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
10 BIG NFL Names Whose
Teammentes Are SICK Of Thema

241K views * 2 weeks ago

Title: 10 BIG NFL Names Whose Teammates Are SICK Of Them
Formula: 10 BIG (Entity) Whose (Members) Are SICK Of Them
Hook score: +453
Why this works:
Negativity – There’s lots of drama in this title, and people love drama.
Authority – “Big NFL Names” grabs your attention more than just “NFL Names”. (Plus it builds curiosity by leaving it open-ended, so you want to know who these players are.)
List – Lists make videos feel more tangible (you know exactly what the video will be about) and they add some curiosity.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a list of negative things that are happening in your niche.
Examples of this hook in action:

5 Austin Neighborhoods People Hate Living In
10 TikTok Trends Everybody Is Sick Of

Pencil Pursuit


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
| Tested EVERY Colored Pencil in
ine WOR BL

930K views + 1 month ago * 170 VPH

Title: I Tested EVERY Colored Pencil in the WORLD!
Formula: I Tested EVERY (Object) in the WORLD!
Hook score: +492
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience is into colored pencils.
Credibility – This title makes you feel like this video is legit, so you’re more likely to watch it.
Epic – Testing every colored pencil “in the WORLD!” makes this video feel epic.
How you can use this hook: Pick out a tool your audience loves and test every option in the world.
Examples of this hook in action:

I Tested EVERY Habit Tracker in the WORLD!
I Tested EVERY Pizza Place in NYC!

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
10 Times Fans Were Caught Crying
Over Their Team in the Stands

18K views * 1 month ago

Title: 10 Times Fans Were Caught Crying Over Their Team in the Stands
Hook score: -71
Why this flopped: This title and thumbnail don’t fit with the rest on this channel and they don’t call out this channel’s core audience.
Every other video on this channel is about the NFL, and these creators make it obvious they’re about the NFL.
They have “NFL” in the title and NFL players in the thumbnails.
But not this one.
So the next time you make a video, make sure it’s about a topic your audience wants to watch on your channel, and make it obvious in the title and thumbnail that your video is about that topic.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Have any questions about the hooks in this edition?
Reply to this email and let me know!
And if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please send them to creatorhooks.com.
Here’s to the war on boring content.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
