## Newsletter 389: 3 Ways To Get 1000000 ViewsMonth On YouTube

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/3-ways-to-get-1000000-views-month-on-youtube/

```
3 Ways To Get 1,000,000 Views/Month On YouTube 
December 8, 2022June 20, 2022 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email has 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time on research.
P.S. If you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Jump Man


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
What Happens If You Jump
Rope For 30 Min Every Day?

77K views + 1 month ago +

Title: What Happens If You Jump Rope For 30 Min Every Day
Formula: What Happens If You (Activity) For 30 Min Every Day?
Hook score: +387
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title asks a question and makes you wonder what does happen if you do this.
Daily Tips – Making a video about doing something everyday is more interesting and tangible* than making a video about doing something every now and then.
Time Frame – “30 Min” gives this video constraints and makes it more interesting and tangible*.
*When I say tangible, I mean it’s easy to know exactly what this video is about. This is the opposite of a vague title, like “What Happens If You Jump Rope Often?”
How you can use this hook: Ask the question of what would happen if you did a relevant activity every day for a specific time frame.
Examples of this hook in action:

What Happens If You Live Stream For 30 Min Every Day?
What Happens If You Do Wall Sits Every Day for 3 Minutes?

$100K Supplement


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
ra

1s

3 Major Ways To Earn Over
$100,000 Per Month In...

25K views - 1 month ago - 3 VPH

Title: 3 Major Ways To Earn Over $100,000 Per Month In Jamaica To Supplement Your 9-5 Income || ANNA NOVIA
Formula: 3 Major Ways To (Achieve Goal) In (Specific Place) To (Reason for Achieving Goal)
Hook score: +400
Why this works:
Too good to be true – This video is not only about a desire everybody wants, but it’s about a desire that sounds almost too good to be true (another example coming later in this edition).
List – People love clicking on list videos.
Specific audience – If you live in Jamaica, you might feel like this video was made specifically for you, so you’re more likely to click and watch.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the three ways they can achieve a massive goal. And make them feel like the video was made especially for them by calling them out in the title.
Examples of this hook in action:

3 Major Ways Engineers Can Land Their Dream 6-Figure Job
3 Ways To Become A Professional Musician In Your 20s

Daily Dues


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
HOW 1 CHANGED

how to change your life: 10
daily habits for 2022 *watch...

276K views + 2 months ago + 120 VPH

Title: how to change your life: 10 daily habits for 2022 *watch this if you’re feeling stuck*
Formula: How to (Achieve Goal): 10 daily habits for (Current Year) *watch this if you’re feeling stuck*
Hook score: +530
Why this works:
Desire – Many people would love to change their lives, and for those who do, most want to do so really bad.
List – People like clicking on list videos.
Daily tips – We’ve got more daily tips here, and daily habits are attractive because we can just plug them into our routine and not worry about when or how often to do them.
Timeliness – “In 2022” lets the audience know that this is what’s working right now.
How you can use this hook: Show your audience the daily habits that will change their life or help them achieve a big goal of theirs.
Examples of this hook in action:

how to change your life: 10 daily money habits for 2022 *watch this if you’re feeling poor*
how to change your mindset: 10 daily habits for 2022

Bout To Get A New Truck


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
How to Write Off 100% of
Your Car as a Business...

80K views - 4 weeks ago +

Title: How to Write Off 100% of Your Car as a Business [STEP-BY-STEP] | Vehicle Tax Deduction | Sec. 179
Formula: How to (Too-Good-To-Be-True Action) [STEP-BY-STEP] | (Keyword-Rich Description)
Hook score: +571
Why this works:
Too good to be true – This sounds too good to be true, which makes it more interesting and exciting.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how to do something step by step that sounds too good to be true.
Examples of this hook in action:

How to have the Perfect Marriage (Step By Step)
How to score a 1600 on the SAT [Step-By-Step Study Guide]

Tricks Are For Kids


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
This Paint Trick Will Make
CHEAP WHITE PAINT Cover...

426K views « 3 weeks ago + 227 VPH

Title: This Paint Trick Will Make CHEAP WHITE PAINT Cover + Hide As Well As The Most Expensive Brands!
Formula: This (Activity) Trick Will Make CHEAP (Item) (Action) As Well As The Most Expensive Brands!
Hook score: +938
Why this works:
Benefit – This video is about a benefit for the audience and it promises a lot for a little, which makes it more exciting.
Curiosity – This title opens a loop by mentioning there’s a trick, but not telling you what the trick is.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a trick where a cheap, DIY, or unconventional method will do the job just as well as an expensive or professional method.
Examples of this hook in action:

This Farming Trick Will Make DIY Chicken Coops Better Than Expensive New Coops!
This iPhone Trick Will Make Your Battery Last 2x Longer

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
GARBAGE DISPOSAL NOT
WORKING?! Try These Easy...

12K views - 3 weeks ago *

Title: GARBAGE DISPOSAL NOT WORKING?! Try These Easy Fixes! (3 Sink Disposal Repairs…More Tips + Tricks!)
Hook score: -86
Why this flopped: This title is more geared for search and will probably do well in the long term, but if you don’t have this specific problem right now, you’re probably not going to watch this video.
That’s not the case with some of the other videos on this channel, like:

NAILS vs. SCREWS…Which Should You Choose?!
Does SELF-PRIMING PAINT Really Work…Or Is It A Marketing Gimmick?
The Truth About PARTICLE BOARD…Is It The Worst Material?!

Also, it seems like this creator’s audience might be more interested in building things than fixing things.
This is a bit of a tough one to nail down why it flopped, but two lessons we can learn from it:

Have a strategy for your video (i.e. browse vs. search) and have proper expectations for it
Get to know your audience and why they really watch your channel

Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Have any questions about the hooks in this edition?
Reply to this email and let me know!
And if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please forward this email to them and send them to creatorhooks.com.
Here’s to the war on boring content.
– Jake
P.S. Follow me on Twitter for more title tips @jthomas__​
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Read last week’s edition »
```

## Newsletter 391: how I would grow on YouTube if I had to start over

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/how-i-would-grow-on-youtube-if-i-had-to-start-over/

```
how I would grow on YouTube (if I had to start over) 
December 8, 2022June 13, 2022 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email has 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time on research.
P.S. If you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Dirty Pop


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
EDM Producer VS POP
Producer (EPIC BATTLE fea...

24K views - 2 weeks ago « 92 VPH

Title: EDM Producer VS POP Producer (EPIC BATTLE feat. Alex Rome)
Formula: [Position] VS [Position] (EPIC BATTLE)
Hook score: +327
Why this works:
X vs. Y – Everybody likes a little competition and this is interesting because people want to know what the differences between these two styles are.
Great example of a collab – These two creators are similar, but different, and this is a fun way they got in front of each other’s audiences.
How you can use this hook: Show your audience a competition between two different, but similar styles. You could do a collab with another creator, or manufacture a competition between the two styles yourself.
Examples of this hook in action:

Crossfitter VS Power Lifter (Epic Fitness Battle)
DIY Dad VS Professional Handyman (Epic Fix-It Challenge)

City Slickers


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
Affordable Cities: 10 US
Metro Areas With Underrate...

203K views - 3 weeks ago «

Title: Affordable Cities: 10 US Metro Areas With Underrated Livability, Walkability and Transit
Formula: (Desired Object): 10 (Places or Tools) With Underrated (Traits)
Hook score: +464
Why this works:
Curiosity – The word “underrated” makes this title more fun and interesting, and “absurdly undervalued” in the thumbnail reiterates that.
Desire – Many people would love to move to a more affordable city, or one with better livability, walkability and transit.
Timeliness – With a recession looming and housing prices sky high, everybody has the word “affordable” on their mind right now.
List – People like clicking on list videos.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a list of desirable objects that are underrated.
Examples of this hook in action:

Hot Stocks: 10 Undervalued Stocks That Are Recession-Proof
Date Night: 10 Underrated Date Night Ideas That Are Simple & Fun

Coding Decoded


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
How | Would Learn To Code
(If | Could Start Over)

1M views « 1 month ago « 796 VPH

Title: How I Would Learn To Code (If I Could Start Over)
Formula: How I Would Learn To [Activity] (If I Could Start Over)
Hook score: +892
Why this works:
Beginner tips – People love “if I could start over” stories. It meets your audience where they’re at. It’s mostly for beginners, and beginners are the biggest and hungriest subset of any audience.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience what you would do if you could start over.
Examples of this hook in action:

How I Would Learn To Be Confident (If I Had To Start Over)
How I Would Buy My First Apartment (f I Had To Start Over)

Training Day


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
5 Dog Training Exercises You
Should Do EVERY DAY At...

285K views + 2 months ago - 146 VPH

Title: 5 Dog Training Exercises You Should Do EVERY DAY At Home!
Formula: 5 (Exercises) You Should Do EVERY DAY At (Convenient Location)!
Hook score: +950
Why this works:
List – People love clicking on list videos.
Daily tips – People love things they can do every day because they’re easy to just plug into your routine.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about exercises they should do every day at home (or another convenient location) to help them achieve their goals.
Examples of this hook in action:

5 Guitar Exercises You Should Do Every Day!
5 Super Foods Kids Should Eat Every Morning For Breakfast!

MySpace Top 8


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
TOP 8 Dividend ETFs For
Passive Income in 2022...

57K views + 1 month ago +

Title: TOP 8 Dividend ETFs For Passive Income in 2022 (High Yield)
Formula: Top 8 (Tools) For (Goal) In (Current Year)
Hook score: +1425
Why this works:
List – Another list video here!
Desire – Almost everyone in the world loves passive income.
Timeliness – “In 2022” lets you know these dividend ETFs can give you passive income right now.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the top tools they can use right now to reach their goals.
Examples of this hook in action:

Top 8 Mountain Cities To Visit In Summer 2022
Top 5 Cameras For YouTubers in 2022

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
a

Teaching Abused And
Terrified Dog To Stop...

15K views + 2 months ago »

Title: Teaching Abused And Terrified Dog To Stop Jumping In One Session
Hook score: -81
Why this flopped: This title is too wordy. When you read it, it takes you too much time to understand what the video is about because the hook is buried behind too many words.
This creator should’ve used “abused” or “terrified” in the title to make it shorter, not both of them.
Plus, the thumbnail is confusing. I would’ve expected the jumping dog to be on the left and the well-behaved dog on the right.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
Have any questions about the hooks in this edition?
Reply to this email and let me know!
And if you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please forward this email to them and send them to creatorhooks.com.
Here’s to the war on boring content.
– Jake
P.S. Follow me on Twitter for more title tips @jthomas__​
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
```

## Newsletter 392: how I would grow on YouTube if I had to start over

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/how-i-would-grow-on-youtube-if-i-had-to-start-over/

```
how I would grow on YouTube (if I had to start over) 
December 8, 2022June 13, 2022 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email has 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time on research.
P.S. If you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Dirty Pop


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
EDM Producer VS POP
Producer (EPIC BATTLE fea...

24K views - 2 weeks ago « 92 VPH

Title: EDM Producer VS POP Producer (EPIC BATTLE feat. Alex Rome)
Formula: [Position] VS [Position] (EPIC BATTLE)
Hook score: +327
Why this works:
X vs. Y – Everybody likes a little competition and this is interesting because people want to know what the differences between these two styles are.
Great example of a collab – These two creators are similar, but different, and this is a fun way they got in front of each other’s audiences.
How you can use this hook: Show your audience a competition between two different, but similar styles. You could do a collab with another creator, or manufacture a competition between the two styles yourself.
Examples of this hook in action:

Crossfitter VS Power Lifter (Epic Fitness Battle)
DIY Dad VS Professional Handyman (Epic Fix-It Challenge)

City Slickers


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
Affordable Cities: 10 US
Metro Areas With Underrate...

203K views - 3 weeks ago «

Title: Affordable Cities: 10 US Metro Areas With Underrated Livability, Walkability and Transit
Formula: (Desired Object): 10 (Places or Tools) With Underrated (Traits)
Hook score: +464
Why this works:
Curiosity – The word “underrated” makes this title more fun and interesting, and “absurdly undervalued” in the thumbnail reiterates that.
Desire – Many people would love to move to a more affordable city, or one with better livability, walkability and transit.
Timeliness – With a recession looming and housing prices sky high, everybody has the word “affordable” on their mind right now.
List – People like clicking on list videos.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about a list of desirable objects that are underrated.
Examples of this hook in action:

Hot Stocks: 10 Undervalued Stocks That Are Recession-Proof
Date Night: 10 Underrated Date Night Ideas That Are Simple & Fun

Coding Decoded


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
How | Would Learn To Code
(If | Could Start Over)

1M views « 1 month ago « 796 VPH

Title: How I Would Learn To Code (If I Could Start Over)

Hook score: +892
Why this works:
Beginner tips – People love “if I could start over” stories. It meets your audience where they’re at. It’s mostly for beginners, and beginners are the biggest and hungriest subset of any audience.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience what you would do if you could start over.
Examples of this hook in action:

How I Would Learn To Be Confident (If I Had To Start Over)
How I Would Buy My First Apartment (f I Had To Start Over)

Training Day


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:

Should Do EVERY DAY At...

Hook score: +950
Why this works:
List – People love clicking on list videos.
Daily tips – People love things they can do every day because they’re easy to just plug into your routine.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about exercises they should do every day at home (or another convenient location) to help them achieve their goals.
Examples of this hook in action:

5 Guitar Exercises You Should Do Every Day!
5 Super Foods Kids Should Eat Every Morning For Breakfast!

MySpace Top 8

TOP 8 Dividend ETFs For

57K views + 1 month ago +

Formula: Top 8 (Tools) For (Goal) In (Current Year)
Hook score: +1425
Why this works:
List – Another list video here!
Desire – Almost everyone in the world loves passive income.
Timeliness – “In 2022” lets you know these dividend ETFs can give you passive income right now.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the top tools they can use right now to reach their goals.
```

## Newsletter 393: 9 YouTube Mistakes That Will Crush Your Channel

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/9-youtube-mistakes-that-will-crush-your-channel/

```
9 YouTube Mistakes That Will Crush Your Channel 
December 8, 2022June 6, 2022 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Chef’s Kiss


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
Why are a restaurant's
vegetables so much better...

1.9M views - 1 month ago +

Title: Why are a restaurant’s vegetables so much better than homemade ones?
Formula: Why are a (Authority)’s (Product) so much better than (Local/Homemade Products)?
Hook score: +549
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title asks a question many of us have asked ourselves and would love to know the answer to. The thumbnail also has contrast between home cook and chef, and the size difference in the Brussel’s sprouts, which builds even more curiosity.
How you can use this hook: What is a question that everyone in your audience has asked themselves about how the pros do something so much better than them? Use that for a simple, yet powerful title.
Examples of this hook in action:

Why are MrBeast’s videos so much better than mine?


Why do professional fishing guides catch so many more fish than me?

Beast Mode


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
3 Habits That Will Make You
A Beast In Matches

72K views + 2months ago +

Title: 3 Habits That Will Make You A Beast In Matches
Formula: 3 Habits that Will Make You A Beast In (Competition)
Hook score: +734
Why this works:
List – People love clicking on lists.
Desire – This audience would love to become a beast in matches.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about 3 habits that will help them reach a big goal of theirs.
Examples of this hook in action:

3 Habits That Will Make You A Beast On The Piano
3 Habits That Will Make Your Marriage Amazing

Decorating Disaster


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Cx]

iv}

WHY YOUR HOME Is %
(DEPRESSING
fy \ |

ae _|

9 DECORATING MISTAKES
THAT COULD MAKE YOU...

1M views - 4months ago

Title: 9 DECORATING MISTAKES THAT COULD MAKE YOU DEPRESSED OR ANXIOUS
Formula: 9 (Industry) Mistakes That Could Make You (Unwanted Emotion or Attribute)
Hook score: +909
Why this works:
List – We’ve got another list here.
Negativity – There are several aspects of negativity here. This video is about mistakes, and the result is you being depressed or anxious. The thumbnail reinforces the negativity by calling your home depressing.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the mistakes they could be making that will leave them with negative emotions.
Examples of this hook in action:

9 Interviewing Mistakes That Lose You The Job
5 Credit Card Mistakes That Will Keep You Poor

Phelps Films


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
AS EASY AS WALKING

—<—

SW

Swim without getting tired

Title: Swim without getting tired
Formula: (Activity) without (Problem)
Hook score: +1074
Why this works:
Benefit – Swimmers (this creator’s audience) would love to swim without getting tired.
Refute an objection – This video refutes the “I can’t swim too long because I get too tired,” objection, so you’ve gotta watch and see how to do it.
Great thumbnail – This thumbnail shows a clear contrast and progression to helping the audience achieve their goal that the title promises.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how to achieve a big goal without their big excuse coming true.
Examples of this hook in action:

Flip Houses Without Paying For Them
Build an Ecom Brand Without Shipping Products

Green Brick Road


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
The Intelligent Investor's
Road to $1,000,000

1.4M views - 4 months ago +

Title: The Intelligent Investor’s Road to $1,000,000
Formula: The (Positive Attribute) (Position)’s Road to (Huge Goal)
Hook score: +1138
Why this works:
Desire – Making $1,000,000 is a huge goal for this channel’s audience.
Beginner tips – The thumbnail text tells you this is for beginners because it says “An investor’s first $1,000,000.”
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about the road to their big goal.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Retired Athlete’s Road To An Injury-Free Body
The Beginner Homesteaders Road To Self-Sufficiency

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
Minimalist Kitchen Essentials
| My traveling kitchen setup.

139K views + 2 months ago - 7 VPH

Title: Minimalist Kitchen Essentials | My traveling kitchen setup.
Hook score: -78
Why this flopped: The majority of this creator’s audience probably cooks in their own kitchen. They don’t have or need a traveling kitchen setup, so they won’t watch this video.
To avoid this mistake, really think about who your audience is and how you can serve them best.
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
If you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please forward this email to them and send them to creatorhooks.com.
Here’s to the war on boring content.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Read last week’s edition »
```

```
Size: 84137 bytes
```
Thumbnail: Minimalist Kitchen Essentials
| My traveling kitchen setup.

139K views + 2 months ago - 7 VPH

## Newsletter 395: The Algorithm Shift That Will Change YouTube

**URL:** https://creatorhooks.com/the-algorithm-shift-that-will-change-youtube/

```
The Algorithm Shift That Will Change YouTube 
December 8, 2022May 30, 2022 by admin 


I’ve asked some of the best creators on YouTube, “How do you write such great titles?”
And they’ve all said the same thing: “I just model what works.”
So this email will show you 5 videos worth modeling to help you write great titles and save time.
Btw, if you want to see all of the titles and thumbnails from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
Be Cool


🖼️ Thumbnail 2:
se

+

i

29 easy things that make you
cool person

537K views - 1 month ago + 78 VPH

Title: 29 easy things that make you a cool person
Formula: 29 easy things that (Achieve Goal)
Hook score: +397
Why this works:
List – People love clicking on lists, although I will admit this is the first list of 29 that’s ever been featured in this newsletter.
Benefit – Everybody wants to be a cool person, and this title makes this video even more attractive because it’s about “easy” things that make you a cool person, and we all want easy things.
How you can use this hook: Give your audience a list about easy things they can do to achieve their goals or become a better person.
Examples of this hook in action:

29 easy things that make you a better real estate agent
10 simple things that save Moms time

Storytime


🖼️ Thumbnail 3:
How Did MINAS ITHIL
Become MINAS MORGUL?

113K views + 1 month ago -

Title: How Did MINAS ITHIL Become MINAS MORGUL? | Middle-Earth Lore
Formula: How Did (Place or Object) Become (Negative Place or Object) | (Keywords)
Hook score: +538
Why this works:
Curiosity – This title is a question, which evokes curiosity.
Negativity – Minas Morgul is an evil city, and people love hearing about villains.
Story – This video talks about changing from a good city to a bad city, so there’s a story behind it.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about how something changed from good to evil.
Examples of this hook in action:

How Did Investing In The Stock Market Go From Best Practices To Boomer Practices?
How Did Carbs Go From The Best Food to Unhealthy Food?

Looking Up


🖼️ Thumbnail 4:
Neuroscientist: "Never Feel
Tired During The Day’ |...

2.6M views - 1 month ago »

Title: Neuroscientist: “Never Feel Tired During The Day” | Andrew Huberman
Formula: (Authority Position): “Never (Unwanted Feeling)” | (Authority Name)
Hook score: +833
Why this works:
Authority – Authority works because we know and trust authority figures. This title uses authority two ways: it uses his position (neuroscientist) and his name (Andrew Huberman).
Negativity – The quote is about moving away from pain — never feeling tired — instead of moving toward pleasure, i.e. feeling energized.
Desire – I, and I feel like I’m speaking for everybody reading this, would love to never feel tired during the day.
How you can use this hook: Grab a quote from an authority figure in your industry about helping your audience move away from pain.
Examples of this hook in action:

Billionaire: “Never Be Poor Again” | Elon Musk
MrBeast: “Quit Making Videos That Don’t Go Viral”

Time For A Change P1


🖼️ Thumbnail 5:
how i plan to reinvent myself
and change my life in one...

157K views - 1 month ago +

Title: how i plan to reinvent myself and change my life in one year | level up
Formula: How I plan to (Achieve Goal) and (Achieve Goal) in one year | level up
Hook score: +1308
Why this works:
Desire – This creator’s audience would love to reinvent themselves and change their lives.
Time frame – “In One Year” makes reinventing yourself and changing your life seem more achievable and tangible.
Change Your Life – I’ve seen the term “change my life” come up a lot in this newsletter. People know what they have and they’re not satisfied, so “change your life” is so powerful.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience how you plan to achieve a big goal in a specific time frame.
Examples of this hook in action:

How I Plan To Visit All Of America’s National Parks In One Year
How I Plan To Get 100,000 Subscribers In One Year

Time For A Change P2


🖼️ Thumbnail 6:
THE END OF AN ERA

The Recession That Will
Change A Generation

1.5M views + 2 weeks ago - 838 VPH

Title: The Recession That Will Change A Generation
Formula: The (Negative Event) That Will Change A (Audience Segment)
Hook score: +2941
Why this works:
Negativity – This video is about a negative event, a recession, plus the thumbnail text talks about the end of an era with a scary-looking graph.
Timeliness – This video rides a current trend because everyone is talking about a recession.
Change – Although this isn’t about changing your life, here’s the word change again. Change helps open a loop, which makes your curious, and starts a story.
How you can use this hook: Tell your audience about an event that will change a specific segment of an audience.
Examples of this hook in action:

The Crypto Project That Will Change A Generation
The Algorithm Shift That Will Change Instagram Forever

Flop of the Week


🖼️ Thumbnail 7:
Let's Discuss ADAPTING
TOLKIEN! (Ft. The Script...

5.2K views - 3 weeks ago -

Title: Let’s Discuss ADAPTING TOLKIEN! (Ft. The Script Department) | Middle-Earth Lore
Hook score: -76
Why this flopped: Let’s get this out of the way first — this video is a podcast video, whereas most of the videos on this channel are voiceovers with cool animations and clips from the movies. That was probably a big reason why it flopped.
But the title was also different.
“Let’s Discuss” has no real benefit, fear, or curiosity, it’s just a plain statement. These creators should’ve taken the most interesting point in the interview and used that for the title, instead of leading with a bland “Let’s Discuss.”
Alright, that wraps up this week’s Creator Hooks!
If you know a fellow creator who needs help with writing better titles, please forward this email to them and send them to creatorhooks.com.
Here’s to the war on boring content.
– Jake
(@jthomas__ on Twitter)
P.S. Read previous editions here.
P.P.S. If you want to see all of the videos from Creator Hooks in one place, check out Creator Hooks Pro.
```
